_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-05 09:54:42Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
import pepWords from '../data/pep_words.json'

// ── Syllabification ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function syllabifyOne(word) {
  if (!word) return []
  const clean = word.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, '')
  if (clean.length <= 3) return [word]
  const lower = clean.toLowerCase()
  const isVowel = c => 'aeiou'.includes(c)
  const vStarts = []
  for (let i = 0; i < lower.length; i++) {
    if (isVowel(lower[i]) && (i === 0 || !isVowel(lower[i - 1]))) vStarts.push(i)
    if (lower[i] === 'y' && i > 0 && !isVowel(lower[i - 1]) && i === lower.length - 1) vStarts.push(i)
  }
  if (vStarts.length <= 1) return [word]
  const splits = []
  for (let v = 0; v < vStarts.length - 1; v++) {
    let v1End = vStarts[v]
    while (v1End + 1 < lower.length && isVowel(lower[v1End + 1])) v1End++
    const v2Start = vStarts[v + 1]
    const cons = []
    for (let i = v1End + 1; i < v2Start; i++) cons.push(i)
    if (cons.length === 0) splits.push(v2Start)
    else if (cons.length === 1) splits.push(cons[0])
    else splits.push(cons[Math.floor(cons.length / 2)])
  }
  const result = []
  let prev = 0
  for (const sp of splits) { if (sp > prev) result.push(word.slice(prev, sp)); prev = sp }
  if (prev < word.length) result.push(word.slice(prev))
  return result.filter(s => s.length > 0)
}

// Returns array of {text, isSep, idx} where idx is the index among real syllables
function syllabify(word) {
  let raw = []
  if (word.includes(' ')) {
    word.split(' ').forEach((w, i) => {
      if (i > 0) raw.push(' ')
      syllabifyOne(w).forEach(s => raw.push(s))
    })
  } else if (word.includes('-')) {
    word.split('-').forEach((w, i) => {
      if (i > 0) raw.push('-')
      syllabifyOne(w).forEach(s => raw.push(s))
    })
  } else {
    raw = syllabifyOne(word)
  }
  let idx = 0
  return raw.map(text => {
    const isSep = text === ' ' || text === '-'
    return { text, isSep, idx: isSep ? -1 : idx++ }
  })
}

// ── Audio cache + fetcher ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const audioCache = new Map() // word -> url (string) | null

async function fetchAudioUrl(word) {
  const key = word.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0] // use first word for phrases
  if (audioCache.has(key)) return audioCache.get(key)
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://api.dictionaryapi.dev/api/v2/entries/en/${encodeURIComponent(key)}`, { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(4000) })
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error()
    const data = await res.json()
    const raw = data[0]?.phonetics?.find(p => p.audio)?.audio || null
    const url = raw ? (raw.startsWith('http') ? raw : 'https:' + raw) : null
    audioCache.set(key, url)
    return url
  } catch {
    audioCache.set(key, null)
    return null
  }
}

// ── TTS helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function speak(text, rate = 0.82) {
  window.speechSynthesis?.cancel()
  const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text)
  u.lang = 'en-US'; u.rate = rate
  window.speechSynthesis?.speak(u)
}
function stopSpeech() { window.speechSynthesis?.cancel() }

// ── useWordAudio hook ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Manages: real-audio fetch, syllable highlight animation, TTS fallback

function useWordAudio(word) {
  const syllables = useMemo(() => syllabify(word), [word])
  const realSyls = useMemo(() => syllables.filter(s => !s.isSep), [syllables])
  const [activeSylIdx, setActiveSylIdx] = useState(-1) // idx among real syllables
  const audioRef = useRef(null)
  const timersRef = useRef([])

  function clearAll() {
    timersRef.current.forEach(clearTimeout)
    timersRef.current = []
    audioRef.current?.pause()
    audioRef.current = null
    setActiveSylIdx(-1)
  }

  function scheduleHighlight(durationMs) {
    const perSyl = durationMs / realSyls.length
    realSyls.forEach((s, i) => {
      const t = setTimeout(() => setActiveSylIdx(s.idx), i * perSyl)
      timersRef.current.push(t)
    })
    timersRef.current.push(setTimeout(() => setActiveSylIdx(-1), durationMs + 400))
  }

  // 🔊 Play full word: real audio → highlight syllables sequentially
  async function playFull() {
    clearAll()
    stopSpeech()
    const url = await fetchAudioUrl(word)
    if (url) {
      const audio = new Audio(url)
      audioRef.current = audio
      audio.onloadedmetadata = () => {
        scheduleHighlight(audio.duration * 1000)
        audio.play().catch(() => fallbackTTS())
      }
      audio.onerror = () => fallbackTTS()
      audio.load()
    } else {
      fallbackTTS()
    }
  }

  function fallbackTTS() {
    speak(word, 0.5)
    scheduleHighlight(realSyls.length * 420)
  }

  // Click individual syllable: highlight it + TTS that syllable slowly
  function playSyl(sylIdx, sylText) {
    clearAll()
    stopSpeech()
    setActiveSylIdx(sylIdx)
    speak(sylText, 0.6)
    timersRef.current.push(setTimeout(() => setActiveSylIdx(-1), 1200))
  }

  useEffect(() => { clearAll(); return clearAll }, [word])

  return { syllables, activeSylIdx, playFull, playSyl }
}

// ── SyllableWord component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const SYL_COLORS = [
  { normal: 'text-blue-300',   active: 'text-blue-100' },
  { normal: 'text-orange-300', active: 'text-orange-100' },
  { normal: 'text-green-300',  active: 'text-green-100' },
  { normal: 'text-pink-300',   active: 'text-pink-100' },
]

function SyllableWord({ syllables, activeSylIdx, onSylClick, size = 'text-4xl' }) {
  return (
    <span className={`${size} font-bold tracking-wide select-none`}>
      {syllables.map((s, i) => {
        if (s.isSep) return <span key={i} className="text-gray-400">{s.text}</span>
        const col = SYL_COLORS[s.idx % SYL_COLORS.length]
        const isActive = activeSylIdx === s.idx
        return (
          <span
            key={i}
            onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onSylClick(s.idx, s.text) }}
            className={`cursor-pointer inline-block transition-all duration-150
              ${isActive
                ? `${col.active} scale-110 underline underline-offset-4 drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_currentColor]`
                : `${col.normal} hover:opacity-80`
              }`}
          >
            {s.text}
          </span>
        )
      })}
    </span>
  )
}

// ── Progress helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function loadProgress() {
  try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('vocab_progress') || '{}') } catch { return {} }
}
function saveProgress(bookName, unitIdx, wordIdx, val) {
  try {
    const s = loadProgress(); s[`vocab_${bookName}_${unitIdx}_${wordIdx}`] = val
    localStorage.setItem('vocab_progress', JSON.stringify(s))
  } catch {}
}
function shuffle(arr) {
  const a = [...arr]
  for (let i = a.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));[a[i], a[j]] = [a[j], a[i]] }
  return a
}
function makeBlank(word) {
  if (word.includes(' ')) return word.split(' ').map(w => w.length <= 2 ? w : w[0] + '_'.repeat(w.length - 2) + w[w.length - 1]).join(' ')
  return word.length <= 2 ? word : word[0] + '_'.repeat(word.length - 2) + word[word.length - 1]
}

// ── Recording hook ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function useRecorder() {
  const [recState, setRecState] = useState('idle')
  const [recUrl, setRecUrl] = useState(null)
  const mediaRef = useRef(null)
  const chunksRef = useRef([])
  const timerRef = useRef(null)

  function reset() {
    setRecState('idle')
    setRecUrl(prev => { if (prev) URL.revokeObjectURL(prev); return null })
    mediaRef.current?.stream?.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
  }
  async function startRec() {
    try {
      reset()
      stopSpeech()
      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
      const mr = new MediaRecorder(stream)
      mediaRef.current = mr; chunksRef.current = []
      mr.ondataavailable = e => { if (e.data.size > 0) chunksRef.current.push(e.data) }
      mr.onstop = () => {
        setRecUrl(URL.createObjectURL(new Blob(chunksRef.current, { type: 'audio/webm' })))
        setRecState('recorded')
        stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
      }
      mr.start(); setRecState('recording')
      timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => mr.state === 'recording' && mr.stop(), 4000)
    } catch { setRecState('idle'); alert('需要麦克风权限才能录音') }
  }
  function stopRec() { clearTimeout(timerRef.current); if (mediaRef.current?.state === 'recording') mediaRef.current.stop() }
  function playRec() { if (recUrl) { stopSpeech(); new Audio(recUrl).play() } }
  useEffect(() => () => { clearTimeout(timerRef.current); reset() }, [])
  return { recState, recUrl, startRec, stopRec, playRec, reset }
}

// ── Book selector ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const GRADE_COLORS = { 3: 'from-green-700 to-green-900', 4: 'from-blue-700 to-blue-900', 5: 'from-purple-700 to-purple-900', 6: 'from-orange-700 to-orange-900' }

function BookGrid({ onSelect }) {
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
      <h2 className="text-white text-xl font-bold mb-5">选择年级册次</h2>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        {pepWords.map(book => (
          <button key={book.bookName} onClick={() => onSelect(book)}
            className={`rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br ${GRADE_COLORS[book.grade]} p-6 text-left hover:opacity-90 active:scale-95 transition-all`}>
            <div className="text-sm text-white/60 mb-1">{book.grade}年级 · {book.sem === 'up' ? '上' : '下'}册</div>
            <div className="text-white font-bold text-lg">{book.bookName}</div>
            <div className="text-white/50 text-sm mt-2">{book.units.length} 单元 · {book.units.reduce((s, u) => s + u.words.length, 0)} 词</div>
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// ── Unit selector ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function UnitGrid({ book, progress, onSelect, onBack }) {
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
      <button onClick={onBack} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm mb-5 transition-colors">← 返回</button>
      <h2 className="text-white text-xl font-bold mb-4">{book.bookName}</h2>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        {book.units.map((unit, ui) => {
          const total = unit.words.length
          const known = unit.words.filter((_, wi) => (progress[`vocab_${book.bookName}_${ui}_${wi}`] || 0) >= 2).length
          const pct = total ? Math.round(known / total * 100) : 0
          return (
            <button key={ui} onClick={() => onSelect(unit, ui)}
              className="rounded-xl bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-600 p-5 text-left transition-all active:scale-95">
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Unit {unit.unit}</div>
              <div className="text-white font-semibold text-base mb-3 leading-snug">{unit.title}</div>
              <div className="w-full h-2 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden mb-1.5">
                <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full" style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
              </div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{known}/{total} 已掌握 · {pct}%</div>
            </button>
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// ── Flash card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function FlashCards({ book, unit, unitIdx, progress, onBack, onProgressChange }) {
  const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0)
  const [showZh, setShowZh] = useState(false)
  const [localMastered, setLocalMastered] = useState({})
  const { recState, recUrl, startRec, stopRec, playRec, reset: resetRec } = useRecorder()
  const word = unit.words[idx]
  const { syllables, activeSylIdx, playFull, playSyl } = useWordAudio(word.word)

  const progKey = `vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${idx}`
  const isMastered = localMastered[idx] !== undefined ? localMastered[idx] : (progress[progKey] || 0) >= 2

  useEffect(() => { setShowZh(false); resetRec() }, [idx])

  function markMastered() {
    saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, idx, 2)
    setLocalMastered(m => ({ ...m, [idx]: true }))
    onProgressChange()
    if (idx < unit.words.length - 1) setIdx(i => i + 1)
  }
  function markRetry() {
    saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, idx, 1)
    setLocalMastered(m => ({ ...m, [idx]: false }))
    onProgressChange()
    if (idx < unit.words.length - 1) setIdx(i => i + 1)
  }

  function handleRecord() {
    if (recState === 'recording') { stopRec(); return }
    if (recState === 'recorded') { playRec(); return }
    startRec()
  }

  const recIcon = recState === 'recording' ? '⏹' : recState === 'recorded' ? '▶' : '🎙'
  const recLabel = recState === 'recording' ? '停止' : recState === 'recorded' ? '回放' : '跟读'
  const recCls = recState === 'recording'
    ? 'bg-red-700 border-red-500 text-white animate-pulse'
    : recState === 'recorded'
    ? 'bg-green-800 border-green-600 text-green-200'
    : 'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700'

  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ height: 'calc(100vh - 120px)' }}>

      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between shrink-0">
        <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">← 返回</button>
        <span className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{idx + 1} / {unit.words.length}</span>
        <span className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${isMastered ? 'bg-green-900/50 text-green-400' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-500'}`}>
          {isMastered ? '✓ 已掌握' : '学习中'}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Progress bar */}
      <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden shrink-0">
        <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-300" style={{ width: `${(idx / unit.words.length) * 100}%` }} />
      </div>

      {/* Word card — compact */}
      <div onClick={() => setShowZh(v => !v)}
        className="shrink-0 w-full bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 py-6 px-6 cursor-pointer hover:border-gray-500 transition-all">

        {/* Syllable display */}
        <SyllableWord syllables={syllables} activeSylIdx={activeSylIdx} onSylClick={playSyl} size="text-4xl" />

        {/* Hint */}
        {activeSylIdx === -1 && (
          <div className="text-gray-600 text-xs">点音节单独发音 · 点卡片翻译</div>
        )}
        {activeSylIdx !== -1 && (
          <div className="text-gray-500 text-xs animate-pulse">● 播放中</div>
        )}

        {/* Chinese */}
        {showZh && <div className="text-xl text-blue-300 font-medium mt-1">{word.zh}</div>}

        {/* Buttons row */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
          {/* 🔊 Real audio + highlight */}
          <button onClick={playFull}
            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 border border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95">
            🔊 发音
          </button>

          {/* 🎙 Record */}
          <button onClick={handleRecord}
            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 border px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 ${recCls}`}>
            {recIcon} {recLabel}
          </button>

          {/* Re-record */}
          {recState === 'recorded' && (
            <button onClick={() => { resetRec(); setTimeout(startRec, 100) }}
              className="bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 border border-gray-700 text-gray-400 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm transition-all active:scale-95">
              🔄
            </button>
          )}
        </div>

        {recState === 'recording' && (
          <div className="text-red-400 text-xs animate-pulse">● 录音中（4秒自动停止）</div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Action buttons */}
      <div className="flex gap-3 shrink-0">
        <button onClick={markRetry}
          className="flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-gray-300 font-semibold text-base transition-colors active:scale-95">
          再练 →
        </button>
        <button onClick={markMastered}
          className="flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl bg-green-700 hover:bg-green-600 text-white font-semibold text-base transition-colors active:scale-95">
          掌握 ✓
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Word grid — fills remaining space */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto min-h-0">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-2 pb-2">
          {unit.words.map((w, i) => {
            const lvl = localMastered[i] !== undefined ? (localMastered[i] ? 2 : 1) : (progress[`vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${i}`] || 0)
            return (
              <button key={i} onClick={() => { setIdx(i); setShowZh(false) }}
                className={`rounded-xl py-2.5 px-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 text-left ${
                  i === idx ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white ring-2 ring-blue-400' :
                  lvl >= 2 ? 'bg-green-900/60 text-green-300' :
                  lvl === 1 ? 'bg-yellow-900/40 text-yellow-400' :
                  'bg-gray-800/80 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'}`}>
                <div className="text-xs opacity-60 mb-0.5 truncate">{w.zh}</div>
                <div className="truncate">{w.word}</div>
              </button>
            )
          })}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Quiz entry */}
      <button onClick={() => onProgressChange('goQuiz')}
        className="shrink-0 w-full py-3 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold text-base transition-colors active:scale-95">
        开始测验 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}

// ── Quiz view ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function QuizView({ book, unit, unitIdx, onBack, onProgressChange }) {
  const [mode, setMode] = useState(null)
  const [qIdx, setQIdx] = useState(0)
  const [options, setOptions] = useState([])
  const [chosen, setChosen] = useState(null)
  const [input, setInput] = useState('')
  const [result, setResult] = useState(null)
  const [score, setScore] = useState({ right: 0, wrong: 0 })
  const [order, setOrder] = useState([])
  const inputRef = useRef()
  const allWords = pepWords.flatMap(b => b.units.flatMap(u => u.words))

  useEffect(() => {
    if (mode) { setOrder(shuffle(unit.words.map((_, i) => i))); setQIdx(0); setScore({ right: 0, wrong: 0 }); setChosen(null); setResult(null); setInput('') }
  }, [mode])
  useEffect(() => { if (mode && order.length > 0) makeOptions() }, [qIdx, order, mode])
  useEffect(() => { if (mode === 'spell' && inputRef.current) inputRef.current.focus() }, [qIdx, mode])

  function makeOptions() {
    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
    const pool = shuffle(allWords.filter(w => w.word !== correct.word && w.zh !== correct.zh))
    setOptions(shuffle([correct, ...pool.slice(0, 3)])); setChosen(null); setResult(null); setInput('')
  }
  function handleChoice(opt) {
    if (result) return
    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
    const ok = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh === correct.zh : opt.word === correct.word
    setChosen(opt); setResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
    setScore(s => ok ? { ...s, right: s.right + 1 } : { ...s, wrong: s.wrong + 1 })
    if (ok) { saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, order[qIdx], 2); onProgressChange() }
    speak(correct.word)
  }
  function handleSpell(e) {
    e.preventDefault(); if (result) return
    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
    const ok = input.trim().toLowerCase() === correct.word.toLowerCase()
    setResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
    setScore(s => ok ? { ...s, right: s.right + 1 } : { ...s, wrong: s.wrong + 1 })
    if (ok) { saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, order[qIdx], 2); onProgressChange() }
    speak(correct.word)
  }
  function next() { qIdx < order.length - 1 ? setQIdx(i => i + 1) : setQIdx(-1); setResult(null); setInput(''); setChosen(null) }

  // Quiz mode selector
  if (!mode) return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6 flex flex-col gap-4">
      <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm self-start">← 返回</button>
      <h2 className="text-white text-xl font-bold">{unit.title} — 选择练习模式</h2>
      {[{ id: 'en2zh', label: '英 → 中', desc: '看英文选中文', emoji: '🇬🇧' },
        { id: 'zh2en', label: '中 → 英', desc: '看中文选英文', emoji: '🇨🇳' },
        { id: 'spell', label: '拼写', desc: '看中文输入英文', emoji: '✏️' }
      ].map(m => (
        <button key={m.id} onClick={() => setMode(m.id)}
          className="flex items-center gap-5 bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-600 rounded-xl p-5 text-left transition-all active:scale-95">
          <span className="text-4xl">{m.emoji}</span>
          <div><div className="text-white font-semibold text-lg">{m.label}</div><div className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{m.desc}</div></div>
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  )

  // Results screen
  if (qIdx === -1) return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-12 flex flex-col items-center gap-6">
      <div className="text-6xl">🎉</div>
      <div className="text-white text-3xl font-bold">完成！</div>
      <div className="text-gray-400 text-lg">{score.right} 对 · {score.wrong} 错</div>
      <div className="flex gap-3">
        <button onClick={() => setMode(null)} className="px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-gray-800 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-gray-700">换模式</button>
        <button onClick={() => { setOrder(shuffle(unit.words.map((_, i) => i))); setQIdx(0); setScore({ right: 0, wrong: 0 }) }}
          className="px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-blue-500">再来一遍</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  )

  const current = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
  const { syllables: qSyls, activeSylIdx: qActive, playFull: qPlayFull, playSyl: qPlaySyl } = useWordAudio(current.word) // eslint-disable-line

  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-4 flex flex-col gap-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <button onClick={() => setMode(null)} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">← 模式</button>
        <span className="text-gray-500">{qIdx + 1}/{order.length}</span>
        <span className="text-green-400 font-mono">{score.right}✓ {score.wrong}✗</span>
      </div>
      <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
        <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(qIdx / order.length) * 100}%` }} />
      </div>

      <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-10 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 min-h-[200px] justify-center">
        {mode === 'en2zh' && (
          <>
            <SyllableWord syllables={qSyls} activeSylIdx={qActive} onSylClick={qPlaySyl} size="text-4xl" />
            <button onClick={qPlayFull} className="text-gray-500 hover:text-white text-sm">🔊 发音</button>
            <div className="text-gray-600 text-sm">选择正确的中文意思</div>
          </>
        )}
        {mode === 'zh2en' && (<><div className="text-4xl font-bold text-blue-300">{current.zh}</div><div className="text-gray-600 text-sm">选择正确的英文单词</div></>)}
        {mode === 'spell' && (<><div className="text-4xl font-bold text-blue-300">{current.zh}</div><div className="text-gray-500 font-mono text-xl tracking-widest">{makeBlank(current.word)}</div></>)}
      </div>

      {mode !== 'spell' && (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          {options.map((opt, i) => {
            const label = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh : opt.word
            const isCorrect = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh === current.zh : opt.word === current.word
            let cls = 'bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 text-gray-300 hover:border-gray-600'
            if (result && isCorrect) cls = 'bg-green-900/60 border border-green-500 text-green-200'
            else if (result && chosen === opt && !isCorrect) cls = 'bg-red-900/60 border border-red-500 text-red-300'
            return <button key={i} onClick={() => handleChoice(opt)} className={`rounded-xl p-5 text-left text-base font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 ${cls}`}>{label}</button>
          })}
        </div>
      )}

      {mode === 'spell' && (
        <form onSubmit={handleSpell} className="flex flex-col gap-3">
          <input ref={inputRef} value={input} onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)} disabled={!!result}
            placeholder="输入英文单词..."
            className={`w-full bg-gray-900 border rounded-xl px-5 py-5 text-white text-center text-xl font-mono outline-none transition-colors
              ${result === 'correct' ? 'border-green-500' : result === 'wrong' ? 'border-red-500' : 'border-gray-700 focus:border-blue-500'}`} />
          {result === 'wrong' && <div className="text-center text-red-400">正确答案：<span className="font-bold text-white text-lg">{current.word}</span></div>}
          {!result && <button type="submit" className="py-4 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold text-base">确认</button>}
        </form>
      )}

      {result && (
        <button onClick={next}
          className={`w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold text-white text-base transition-all active:scale-95 ${result === 'correct' ? 'bg-green-700 hover:bg-green-600' : 'bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600'}`}>
          {qIdx < order.length - 1 ? '下一题 →' : '查看结果'}
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function VocabStudy({ onSetBack }) {
  const [view, setView] = useState('books')
  const [book, setBook] = useState(null)
  const [unit, setUnit] = useState(null)
  const [unitIdx, setUnitIdx] = useState(0)
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(loadProgress)

  const refreshProgress = useCallback((signal) => {
    setProgress(loadProgress())
    if (signal === 'goQuiz') setView('quiz')
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (view === 'books') onSetBack?.(null)
    else if (view === 'units') onSetBack?.(() => () => setView('books'))
    else if (view === 'cards') onSetBack?.(() => () => setView('units'))
    else if (view === 'quiz') onSetBack?.(() => () => setView('cards'))
  }, [view, onSetBack])

  if (view === 'books') return <BookGrid onSelect={b => { setBook(b); setView('units') }} />
  if (view === 'units') return <UnitGrid book={book} progress={progress} onSelect={(u, ui) => { setUnit(u); setUnitIdx(ui); setView('cards') }} onBack={() => setView('books')} />
  if (view === 'cards') return <FlashCards book={book} unit={unit} unitIdx={unitIdx} progress={progress} onBack={() => setView('units')} onProgressChange={refreshProgress} />
  if (view === 'quiz') return <QuizView book={book} unit={unit} unitIdx={unitIdx} onBack={() => setView('cards')} onProgressChange={refreshProgress} />
  return null
}

```

The function is seeing two vowel groups and breaking them apart, which breaks the phonics rule where the final silent 'e' modifies the preceding vowel sound. The core issue is that my syllable-splitting algorithm doesn't account for English phonetic rules like the silent 'e' at the end of words, so it incorrectly divides "name" into two syllables when it's actually one. _**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-05 23:56:46Z)**_

两个叠加的问题：

**① 音节切分本身就错了**
"name" 是**单音节词**——末尾 `e` 是"魔法e"（silent e），不发音，只是让前面的 `a` 变成长音 /eɪ/（内）。算法看到两个元音 `a` 和 `e` 就切成了 `na` + `me`，这本身就是错的。

**② TTS 读孤立音节没有上下文**
即使切对了，TTS 读单独的 `"na"` 时，不知道后面跟着 `me`，所以按短音规则发 /næ/（那）而不是长音 /neɪ/（内）。英语元音发音严重依赖**整词上下文**，孤立读字母组合天生不准。

---

**结论：** 单音节词不应该被拆开，多音节词拆开后TTS也会跑音。

**方向选择（你来决定）：**

- **A：单音节词不拆**（修算法），但多音节词（`mon-key`、`el-e-phant`）的音节TTS依然不准
- **B：放弃TTS读音节，改为"点音节→高亮该音节+播放完整单词真人音频"**，音质完全准确，只是无法孤立听单个音节
- **C：只标颜色不能点击发音**，纯视觉区分音节，发音只用完整单词

哪个方向？

流程：

2. 使用 Forced Alignment（如 MFA）生成 phoneme 时间戳

  ]
}

5. 前端逻辑（React Native）：

- 点击整词 → play(audio, 0, duration)

- 不使用 TTS 读音节
- 单音节词不拆

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-06 00:09:39Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is proposing a more sophisticated approach using Forced Alignment (like Montreal Forced Aligner - MFA) to get precise phoneme timestamps from word audio files, then merge phonemes into syllables/phonics, and use the real audio sliced at the correct timestamps for syllable playback.

Let me analyze this approach:

**The approach:**
1. Get word audio (MP3 from dictionaryapi.dev or similar)
2. Run Forced Alignment (MFA) to get phoneme-level timestamps
3. Group phonemes into syllables


4. Store as JSON with segment timestamps
5. Frontend: slice audio at timestamps for syllable playback

**Analysis:**

**Pros:**
- ✅ 100% accurate pronunciation (real audio sliced)
- ✅ No TTS issues
- ✅ Works for all words including "magic e" patterns
- ✅ Single-syllable words naturally won't be split if phoneme grouping is done right

**Cons/Challenges:**

The main hurdle is that MFA requires setting up a Python environment with Conda, installing acoustic models, and managing dictionary files—this adds significant backend complexity. I'd need to figure out whether to run this as a preprocessing step for a word database or handle it dynamically, and there's the question of whether the infrastructure can handle the computational load. models
   - Complex setup, not trivial

2. **Processing pipeline**: They need to run MFA on ~470 PEP words, which is feasible as a one-time batch process

3. **Audio source**: Need to get the MP3 for each word first (from dictionaryapi.dev), then process with MFA

4. **Audio slicing in browser**: Web Audio API can slice audio by time very accurately using `AudioContext.decodeAudioData()` and creating buffer slices. This part is well-supported.

5. **Phoneme-to-syllable grouping**: After getting phoneme timestamps, grouping them into syllables requires phonological rules. For English, the CMU dict gives ARPAbet phonemes which need to be grouped into syllables.

6. **Pre-processing vs. real-time**: This would need to be done as a build-time preprocessing step, generating a JSON file with all word segments. For 470 words, this is very manageable.

I'm also considering simpler alternatives that avoid MFA entirely. The dictionaryapi.dev endpoint provides IPA transcriptions alongside audio, which could help determine syllable boundaries more accurately. Or I could leverage CMU Dict's pre-syllabified ARPAbet forms and estimate timing proportionally based on syllable count, though this sacrifices precision. The tradeoff is clear: MFA gives exact timing but requires more setup, while the simpler approaches are quicker to implement but won't be as accurate.

For this specific use case with only ~470 elementary school words, the MFA approach might be overkill in complexity. A more practical pipeline would fetch the audio and IPA from dictionaryapi.dev, parse the IPA to count phonemes per syllable, then estimate timing by dividing the total duration proportionally. The Web Audio API handles precise slicing well in the browser using offset and duration parameters on the audio source node.

Before diving deeper, I should clarify whether this is for the web app or a new React Native version, since that affects the implementation. I'd also want to confirm whether the user can run the MFA preprocessing pipeline locally with Python, and if one-time setup is acceptable. Honestly, for this vocabulary size, skipping MFA entirely and using IPA data to estimate syllable boundaries proportionally might be the sweet spot—it avoids the infrastructure overhead while still giving reasonable accuracy for the slicing.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-06 00:09:53Z)**_

思路正确，分析如下：

---

**✅ 可行的部分**

| 环节 | 可行性 | 说明 |
|------|--------|------|
| dictionaryapi.dev 拿 MP3 | ✅ 已做 | 免费真人音频 |
| Web Audio API 按时间切片播放 | ✅ 很成熟 | `AudioBufferSourceNode.start(0, start, duration)` |
| 单音节词不拆 | ✅ 自然解决 | MFA 不会强拆 |
| 音质100%准确 | ✅ 核心优势 | 完全来自原始音频 |

---

**⚠️ 真正的麻烦点**

**MFA 运行环境重：**
- 需要 Python + Conda + 声学模型 + CMU 词典
- 安装配置本身就是一个工程
- 但对 ~470 个小学词汇，**只需跑一次**生成 JSON，之后不再需要

**Phoneme → Syllable 合并不是免费的：**
MFA 输出的是音素级别（`t`, `iː`, `tʃ`, `ə`），合并成音节需要额外的音节化规则，否则 `teacher` 的音素序列还是不知道哪里断

**你写的是 React Native，现在 App 是 React Web：**
- 切片逻辑不同（RN 用 `expo-av`，Web 用 `AudioContext`）
- 需要确认目标平台

---

**更轻量的替代方案（同样原理，省掉 MFA）**

```
dictionaryapi.dev 返回:
  audio: "teacher.mp3"  
  phonetic: "/ˈtiː.tʃər/"  ← IPA 自带音节点（.）
```

IPA 里的 `.` 就是音节边界，不需要 MFA。

流程变成：
1. 拿到 IPA → 按 `.` 分出每个音节的字符数
2. 用字符数比例估算时间戳（`total_duration × char_ratio`）
3. 切片播放

精度：约 ±50ms，对于教学场景完全够用，**零额外工具**。

---

**结论**

| 方案 | 精度 | 复杂度 | 推荐场景 |
|------|------|--------|----------|
| MFA 完整流程 | ★★★★★ | 高 | 专业产品 |
| IPA 比例估算 | ★★★★☆ | 低 | 当前场景 ✅ |
| TTS 读音节 | ★★☆☆☆ | 零 | 不推荐 |

**建议先做 IPA 比例方案**，如果精度不满意再上 MFA。要做吗？

---

Continuing through the rest of Unit 2 and into Unit 3, I'm working through additional vocabulary including common verbs like "sing," "dance," and "talk," along with nouns for objects and concepts like "gift," "picture," "card," and "song," plus useful function words like "or," "so," and "much."

Now moving into Unit 3, I'm covering school supplies and objects like erasers, rulers, pens, pencils, books, and bags, along with action verbs related to the five senses—seeing, smelling, tasting, hearing, and touching—which help build vocabulary around sensory experiences and perception.

Continuing with Unit 4, I'm working through food and meal-related vocabulary including breakfast items like bread, eggs, milk, noodles, juice, rice, meat, and vegetables, establishing foundational terms for discussing meals and nutrition. I'm continuing through the vocabulary list, now working through the remaining words from Unit 5 and moving into Unit 6, which covers numbers from eleven to twenty along with some action words. I'm mapping out the vocabulary to the correct Grade 3 PEP units based on their themes—words like "where" and "from" fit Unit 1, body parts go to Unit 2, school supplies to Unit 3, breakfast items to Unit 4, and numbers to Unit 6. Now I'm working on implementing the IPA syllable counting logic in code...

Still writing syllable counter... I'm testing this approach with "teacher" — the IPA is /ˈtiːtʃə(r)/, which should have 2 syllables, but my stress-counting method only gives 1. The real issue is that relying on stress marks fails when there's just primary stress without secondary stress, so I need to switch to counting vowel nuclei instead.

Writing the syllable counter... I see the issue now—"student" has a syllabic consonant in the second syllable where the schwa drops out, so counting vowel nuclei alone misses it. Rather than trying to parse IPA for these edge cases, I should stick with the orthographic syllabifier for both display and counting, since it already handles these cases correctly for most words in the list.

Since the user provided IPA data, I'll display it on the cards for pronunciation reference, but rely on the orthographic syllable count to divide the audio proportionally from the dictionary API. This keeps things simple and avoids the complexity of parsing IPA phonetics.

Now I'm setting up the Web Audio API infrastructure...

I need a singleton AudioContext that persists across the app, and a cache to avoid re-fetching and re-decoding audio files. The fetch function handles downloading the audio from the URL, decoding it into an AudioBuffer, and storing it for reuse. Then playSlice takes that buffer and plays just the portion between two time points by using the start offset and duration parameters.

Now I'm building out the React hook that manages audio playback for individual words, handling syllable extraction and tracking which syllable is currently playing.

Writing the hook implementation... Writing the audio playback logic... Finishing the TTS fallback for when the buffer isn't available, then setting up a cleanup effect for the word change. Now I'm thinking about the card display—I can show the word with colored syllables, the IPA in brackets, and reveal the Chinese meaning on flip, which makes this much more educational. I need to update the word data structure to include IPA and restructure the vocab file, then modify the card component to display and use this new information.

For the audio context, I should handle iOS Safari's requirement by creating it lazily after the first user interaction, and for CORS issues with the dictionary API audio URLs, I'll try direct fetching first and gracefully handle any failures.

Structuring the data now...

```jsx
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
import pepWords from '../data/pep_words.json'

// ── Orthographic syllabification (visual only) ────────────────────────────────

function syllabifyOne(word) {
  if (!word) return []
  const clean = word.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, '')
  if (clean.length <= 3) return [word]
  const lower = clean.toLowerCase()
  const isVowel = c => 'aeiou'.includes(c)
  const vStarts = []
  for (let i = 0; i < lower.length; i++) {
    if (isVowel(lower[i]) && (i === 0 || !isVowel(lower[i - 1]))) vStarts.push(i)
    if (lower[i] === 'y' && i > 0 && !isVowel(lower[i - 1]) && i === lower.length - 1) vStarts.push(i)
  }
  if (vStarts.length <= 1) return [word]
  const splits = []
  for (let v = 0; v < vStarts.length - 1; v++) {
    let v1End = vStarts[v]
    while (v1End + 1 < lower.length && isVowel(lower[v1End + 1])) v1End++
    const v2Start = vStarts[v + 1]
    const cons = []
    for (let i = v1End + 1; i < v2Start; i++) cons.push(i)
    if (cons.length === 0) splits.push(v2Start)
    else if (cons.length === 1) splits.push(cons[0])
    else splits.push(cons[Math.floor(cons.length / 2)])
  }
  const result = []; let prev = 0
  for (const sp of splits) { if (sp > prev) result.push(word.slice(prev, sp)); prev = sp }
  if (prev < word.length) result.push(word.slice(prev))
  return result.filter(s => s.length > 0)
}

// Returns [{text, isSep, idx}] — idx is index among real (non-sep) syllables
function syllabify(word) {
  let raw = []
  if (word.includes(' ')) {
    word.split(' ').forEach((w, i) => { if (i > 0) raw.push(' '); syllabifyOne(w).forEach(s => raw.push(s)) })
  } else if (word.includes('-')) {
    word.split('-').forEach((w, i) => { if (i > 0) raw.push('-'); syllabifyOne(w).forEach(s => raw.push(s)) })
  } else {
    raw = syllabifyOne(word)
  }
  let idx = 0
  return raw.map(text => ({ text, isSep: text === ' ' || text === '-', idx: (text === ' ' || text === '-') ? -1 : idx++ }))
}

// ── IPA syllable count ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Used to decide how many equal-proportion slices to cut from the audio

function countIPASyllables(ipa) {
  if (!ipa) return null
  // Strip non-phonetic decoration
  let s = ipa.replace(/[\/\(\)\[\]ˈˌ\.]/g, '').replace(/ː/g, '')
  // Collapse diphthongs to single token so they count as 1 nucleus
  for (const d of ['eɪ','aɪ','ɔɪ','əʊ','aʊ','ɪə','eə','ʊə']) s = s.split(d).join('V')
  const count = (s.match(/[aeiouæɑɒɔəɜɪʊʌV]/g) || []).length
  return Math.max(1, count)
}

// ── Web Audio globals ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

let _audioCtx = null
function getCtx() {
  if (!_audioCtx || _audioCtx.state === 'closed') {
    _audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)()
  }
  if (_audioCtx.state === 'suspended') _audioCtx.resume()
  return _audioCtx
}

const urlCache = new Map()   // word -> mp3 url | null
const bufCache = new Map()   // url  -> AudioBuffer

async function fetchUrl(word) {
  const key = word.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0]
  if (urlCache.has(key)) return urlCache.get(key)
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://api.dictionaryapi.dev/api/v2/entries/en/${encodeURIComponent(key)}`,
      { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5000) })
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error()
    const data = await res.json()
    const raw = data[0]?.phonetics?.find(p => p.audio)?.audio || null
    const url = raw ? (raw.startsWith('http') ? raw : 'https:' + raw) : null
    urlCache.set(key, url); return url
  } catch { urlCache.set(key, null); return null }
}

async function fetchBuffer(url) {
  if (bufCache.has(url)) return bufCache.get(url)
  try {
    const ab = await fetch(url).then(r => r.arrayBuffer())
    const buf = await getCtx().decodeAudioData(ab)
    bufCache.set(url, buf); return buf
  } catch { return null }
}

let _currentSource = null
function stopAudio() {
  try { _currentSource?.stop() } catch {}
  _currentSource = null
}

function playBuffer(buffer, startSec = 0, endSec = null) {
  stopAudio()
  const ctx = getCtx()
  const src = ctx.createBufferSource()
  src.buffer = buffer
  src.connect(ctx.destination)
  const dur = endSec != null ? endSec - startSec : buffer.duration - startSec
  src.start(0, startSec, dur)
  _currentSource = src
  return src
}

// ── TTS fallback ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function speak(text, rate = 0.82) {
  window.speechSynthesis?.cancel()
  const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text)
  u.lang = 'en-US'; u.rate = rate
  window.speechSynthesis?.speak(u)
}

// ── useWordAudio hook ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function useWordAudio(word, ipa) {
  const syllables = useMemo(() => syllabify(word), [word])
  const realSyls  = useMemo(() => syllables.filter(s => !s.isSep), [syllables])
  const [activeSylIdx, setActiveSylIdx] = useState(-1)
  const [loading, setLoading]           = useState(false)
  const timersRef = useRef([])

  function clearTimers() { timersRef.current.forEach(clearTimeout); timersRef.current = [] }
  function reset() { clearTimers(); stopAudio(); setActiveSylIdx(-1) }

  // Determine syllable count: prefer IPA count, fallback to orthographic
  const sylCount = useMemo(() => countIPASyllables(ipa) ?? realSyls.length, [ipa, realSyls])

  async function getBuffer() {
    const url = await fetchUrl(word)
    return url ? fetchBuffer(url) : null
  }

  function scheduleHighlight(durationMs) {
    const n = Math.min(sylCount, realSyls.length)
    const perSyl = durationMs / n
    realSyls.slice(0, n).forEach((s, i) => {
      timersRef.current.push(setTimeout(() => setActiveSylIdx(s.idx), i * perSyl))
    })
    timersRef.current.push(setTimeout(() => setActiveSylIdx(-1), durationMs + 400))
  }

  // 🔊 Play full word + sequential syllable highlight
  async function playFull() {
    reset()
    setLoading(true)
    const buf = await getBuffer()
    setLoading(false)
    if (buf) {
      scheduleHighlight(buf.duration * 1000)
      playBuffer(buf)
    } else {
      speak(word, 0.5)
      scheduleHighlight(realSyls.length * 420)
    }
  }

  // Click syllable → play that audio slice (proportional)
  async function playSyl(sylIdx) {
    reset()
    setActiveSylIdx(sylIdx)
    timersRef.current.push(setTimeout(() => setActiveSylIdx(-1), 1500))

    const buf = await getBuffer()
    const n = Math.min(sylCount, realSyls.length)

    if (buf && n > 1) {
      const realIdx = realSyls.findIndex(s => s.idx === sylIdx)
      if (realIdx >= 0) {
        const perSyl = buf.duration / n
        playBuffer(buf, realIdx * perSyl, (realIdx + 1) * perSyl)
        return
      }
    }
    if (buf) { playBuffer(buf); return }
    // last resort TTS for this syllable
    const sylText = realSyls.find(s => s.idx === sylIdx)?.text || word
    speak(sylText, 0.65)
  }

  useEffect(() => { reset(); return reset }, [word])
  return { syllables, activeSylIdx, loading, playFull, playSyl }
}

// ── SyllableWord ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const SYL_COLORS = [
  { base: 'text-blue-300',   active: 'text-blue-100'   },
  { base: 'text-orange-300', active: 'text-orange-100' },
  { base: 'text-emerald-300',active: 'text-emerald-100'},
  { base: 'text-pink-300',   active: 'text-pink-100'   },
]

function SyllableWord({ syllables, activeSylIdx, onSylClick, size = 'text-4xl' }) {
  return (
    <span className={`${size} font-bold tracking-wide select-none`}>
      {syllables.map((s, i) => {
        if (s.isSep) return <span key={i} className="text-gray-500">{s.text}</span>
        const col = SYL_COLORS[s.idx % SYL_COLORS.length]
        const active = activeSylIdx === s.idx
        return (
          <span key={i} onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); onSylClick(s.idx) }}
            className={`cursor-pointer inline-block transition-all duration-150
              ${active ? `${col.active} scale-110 underline underline-offset-4 drop-shadow-[0_0_10px_currentColor]`
                       : `${col.base} hover:opacity-75`}`}>
            {s.text}
          </span>
        )
      })}
    </span>
  )
}

// ── Progress helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function loadProgress() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('vocab_progress') || '{}') } catch { return {} } }
function saveProgress(bookName, unitIdx, wordIdx, val) {
  try { const s = loadProgress(); s[`vocab_${bookName}_${unitIdx}_${wordIdx}`] = val; localStorage.setItem('vocab_progress', JSON.stringify(s)) } catch {}
}
function shuffle(arr) {
  const a = [...arr]
  for (let i = a.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));[a[i], a[j]] = [a[j], a[i]] }
  return a
}
function makeBlank(w) {
  if (w.includes(' ')) return w.split(' ').map(p => p.length <= 2 ? p : p[0] + '_'.repeat(p.length - 2) + p[p.length - 1]).join(' ')
  return w.length <= 2 ? w : w[0] + '_'.repeat(w.length - 2) + w[w.length - 1]
}

// ── Recording hook ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function useRecorder() {
  const [recState, setRecState] = useState('idle')
  const [recUrl, setRecUrl]     = useState(null)
  const mrRef = useRef(null); const chunksRef = useRef([]); const timerRef = useRef(null)

  function reset() {
    setRecState('idle')
    setRecUrl(prev => { if (prev) URL.revokeObjectURL(prev); return null })
    mrRef.current?.stream?.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
  }
  async function startRec() {
    try {
      reset(); stopAudio(); window.speechSynthesis?.cancel()
      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
      const mr = new MediaRecorder(stream); mrRef.current = mr; chunksRef.current = []
      mr.ondataavailable = e => { if (e.data.size > 0) chunksRef.current.push(e.data) }
      mr.onstop = () => { setRecUrl(URL.createObjectURL(new Blob(chunksRef.current, { type: 'audio/webm' }))); setRecState('recorded'); stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()) }
      mr.start(); setRecState('recording')
      timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => mr.state === 'recording' && mr.stop(), 4000)
    } catch { setRecState('idle'); alert('需要麦克风权限') }
  }
  function stopRec() { clearTimeout(timerRef.current); if (mrRef.current?.state === 'recording') mrRef.current.stop() }
  function playRec() { if (recUrl) { stopAudio(); window.speechSynthesis?.cancel(); new Audio(recUrl).play() } }
  useEffect(() => () => { clearTimeout(timerRef.current); reset() }, [])
  return { recState, recUrl, startRec, stopRec, playRec, reset }
}

// ── Book selector ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const GRADE_COLORS = { 3: 'from-green-700 to-green-900', 4: 'from-blue-700 to-blue-900', 5: 'from-purple-700 to-purple-900', 6: 'from-orange-700 to-orange-900' }

function BookGrid({ onSelect }) {
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
      <h2 className="text-white text-xl font-bold mb-5">选择年级册次</h2>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        {pepWords.map(book => (
          <button key={book.bookName} onClick={() => onSelect(book)}
            className={`rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br ${GRADE_COLORS[book.grade]} p-6 text-left hover:opacity-90 active:scale-95 transition-all`}>
            <div className="text-sm text-white/60 mb-1">{book.grade}年级 · {book.sem === 'up' ? '上' : '下'}册</div>
            <div className="text-white font-bold text-lg">{book.bookName}</div>
            <div className="text-white/50 text-sm mt-2">{book.units.length} 单元 · {book.units.reduce((s, u) => s + u.words.length, 0)} 词</div>
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// ── Unit selector ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function UnitGrid({ book, progress, onSelect, onBack }) {
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
      <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm mb-5 block transition-colors">← 返回</button>
      <h2 className="text-white text-xl font-bold mb-4">{book.bookName}</h2>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        {book.units.map((unit, ui) => {
          const total = unit.words.length
          const known = unit.words.filter((_, wi) => (progress[`vocab_${book.bookName}_${ui}_${wi}`] || 0) >= 2).length
          const pct = total ? Math.round(known / total * 100) : 0
          return (
            <button key={ui} onClick={() => onSelect(unit, ui)}
              className="rounded-xl bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-600 p-5 text-left transition-all active:scale-95">
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Unit {unit.unit}</div>
              <div className="text-white font-semibold text-base mb-3">{unit.title}</div>
              <div className="w-full h-2 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden mb-1.5">
                <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full" style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
              </div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{known}/{total} 已掌握</div>
            </button>
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// ── Flash card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function FlashCards({ book, unit, unitIdx, progress, onBack, onProgressChange }) {
  const [idx, setIdx]               = useState(0)
  const [showZh, setShowZh]         = useState(false)
  const [localMastered, setLocalM]  = useState({})
  const { recState, recUrl, startRec, stopRec, playRec, reset: resetRec } = useRecorder()
  const word = unit.words[idx]
  const { syllables, activeSylIdx, loading, playFull, playSyl } = useWordAudio(word.word, word.ipa)

  const progKey  = `vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${idx}`
  const mastered = localMastered[idx] !== undefined ? localMastered[idx] : (progress[progKey] || 0) >= 2

  useEffect(() => { setShowZh(false); resetRec() }, [idx])

  function mark(val) {
    saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, idx, val)
    setLocalM(m => ({ ...m, [idx]: val >= 2 }))
    onProgressChange()
    if (idx < unit.words.length - 1) setIdx(i => i + 1)
  }

  function handleRecord() {
    if (recState === 'recording') { stopRec(); return }
    if (recState === 'recorded')  { playRec(); return }
    startRec()
  }

  const recIcon  = recState === 'recording' ? '⏹' : recState === 'recorded' ? '▶' : '🎙'
  const recLabel = recState === 'recording' ? '停止' : recState === 'recorded' ? '回放' : '跟读'
  const recCls   = recState === 'recording' ? 'bg-red-700 border-red-500 text-white animate-pulse'
                 : recState === 'recorded'   ? 'bg-green-800 border-green-600 text-green-200'
                 :                             'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700'

  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ height: 'calc(100vh - 110px)' }}>

      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between shrink-0">
        <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">← 返回</button>
        <span className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{idx + 1} / {unit.words.length}</span>
        <span className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${mastered ? 'bg-green-900/50 text-green-400' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-500'}`}>
          {mastered ? '✓ 已掌握' : '学习中'}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Progress bar */}
      <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden shrink-0">
        <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full transition-all" style={{ width: `${(idx / unit.words.length) * 100}%` }} />
      </div>

      {/* Word card */}
      <div onClick={() => setShowZh(v => !v)}
        className="shrink-0 w-full bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 px-6 cursor-pointer hover:border-gray-500 transition-all">

        {/* Syllable word */}
        <SyllableWord syllables={syllables} activeSylIdx={activeSylIdx} onSylClick={playSyl} size="text-4xl" />

        {/* IPA */}
        <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm font-mono tracking-wide">{word.ipa}</div>

        {/* Status hint */}
        {activeSylIdx === -1 && !loading && (
          <div className="text-gray-700 text-xs">点音节单独播放 · 点卡片查看中文</div>
        )}
        {loading && <div className="text-blue-400 text-xs animate-pulse">加载音频…</div>}
        {activeSylIdx !== -1 && <div className="text-gray-500 text-xs animate-pulse">● 播放中</div>}

        {/* Chinese */}
        {showZh && <div className="text-xl text-blue-300 font-medium mt-1">{word.zh}</div>}

        {/* Buttons */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-2" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
          <button onClick={playFull}
            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 border border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95">
            🔊 发音
          </button>
          <button onClick={handleRecord}
            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 border px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 ${recCls}`}>
            {recIcon} {recLabel}
          </button>
          {recState === 'recorded' && (
            <button onClick={() => { resetRec(); setTimeout(startRec, 100) }}
              className="bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 border border-gray-700 text-gray-400 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm transition-all active:scale-95">
              🔄
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
        {recState === 'recording' && <div className="text-red-400 text-xs animate-pulse">● 录音中（4秒自动停）</div>}
      </div>

      {/* Mark buttons */}
      <div className="flex gap-3 shrink-0">
        <button onClick={() => mark(1)} className="flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-gray-300 font-semibold text-base transition-colors active:scale-95">再练 →</button>
        <button onClick={() => mark(2)} className="flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl bg-green-700 hover:bg-green-600 text-white font-semibold text-base transition-colors active:scale-95">掌握 ✓</button>
      </div>

      {/* Word grid */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto min-h-0">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-2 pb-2">
          {unit.words.map((w, i) => {
            const lvl = localMastered[i] !== undefined ? (localMastered[i] ? 2 : 1) : (progress[`vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${i}`] || 0)
            return (
              <button key={i} onClick={() => { setIdx(i); setShowZh(false) }}
                className={`rounded-xl py-2.5 px-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 text-left ${
                  i === idx    ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white ring-2 ring-blue-400' :
                  lvl >= 2     ? 'bg-green-900/60 text-green-300' :
                  lvl === 1    ? 'bg-yellow-900/40 text-yellow-400' :
                                 'bg-gray-800/80 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'}`}>
                <div className="text-xs opacity-60 mb-0.5 truncate">{w.zh}</div>
                <div className="truncate">{w.word}</div>
              </button>
            )
          })}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Quiz entry */}
      <button onClick={() => onProgressChange('goQuiz')}
        className="shrink-0 w-full py-3 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold text-base transition-colors active:scale-95">
        开始测验 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}

// ── Quiz ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function QuizWord({ word, ipa }) {
  const { syllables, activeSylIdx, playFull, playSyl } = useWordAudio(word, ipa)
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
      <SyllableWord syllables={syllables} activeSylIdx={activeSylIdx} onSylClick={playSyl} size="text-4xl" />
      <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm font-mono">{ipa}</div>
      <button onClick={playFull} className="text-gray-500 hover:text-white text-sm">🔊 发音</button>
    </div>
  )
}

function QuizView({ book, unit, unitIdx, onBack, onProgressChange }) {
  const [mode, setMode]     = useState(null)
  const [qIdx, setQIdx]     = useState(0)
  const [options, setOpts]  = useState([])
  const [chosen, setChosen] = useState(null)
  const [input, setInput]   = useState('')
  const [result, setResult] = useState(null)
  const [score, setScore]   = useState({ right: 0, wrong: 0 })
  const [order, setOrder]   = useState([])
  const inputRef = useRef()
  const allWords = pepWords.flatMap(b => b.units.flatMap(u => u.words))

  useEffect(() => {
    if (mode) { setOrder(shuffle(unit.words.map((_, i) => i))); setQIdx(0); setScore({ right: 0, wrong: 0 }); setChosen(null); setResult(null); setInput('') }
  }, [mode])
  useEffect(() => { if (mode && order.length > 0) makeOpts() }, [qIdx, order, mode])
  useEffect(() => { if (mode === 'spell' && inputRef.current) inputRef.current.focus() }, [qIdx, mode])

  function makeOpts() {
    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
    const pool = shuffle(allWords.filter(w => w.word !== correct.word && w.zh !== correct.zh))
    setOpts(shuffle([correct, ...pool.slice(0, 3)])); setChosen(null); setResult(null); setInput('')
  }
  function handleChoice(opt) {
    if (result) return
    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
    const ok = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh === correct.zh : opt.word === correct.word
    setChosen(opt); setResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
    setScore(s => ok ? { ...s, right: s.right + 1 } : { ...s, wrong: s.wrong + 1 })
    if (ok) { saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, order[qIdx], 2); onProgressChange() }
  }
  function handleSpell(e) {
    e.preventDefault(); if (result) return
    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
    const ok = input.trim().toLowerCase() === correct.word.toLowerCase()
    setResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
    setScore(s => ok ? { ...s, right: s.right + 1 } : { ...s, wrong: s.wrong + 1 })
    if (ok) { saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, order[qIdx], 2); onProgressChange() }
  }
  function next() { qIdx < order.length - 1 ? setQIdx(i => i + 1) : setQIdx(-1); setResult(null); setInput(''); setChosen(null) }

  if (!mode) return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6 flex flex-col gap-4">
      <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm self-start">← 返回</button>
      <h2 className="text-white text-xl font-bold">{unit.title} — 练习模式</h2>
      {[{ id: 'en2zh', label: '英 → 中', desc: '看英文选中文', emoji: '🇬🇧' },
        { id: 'zh2en', label: '中 → 英', desc: '看中文选英文', emoji: '🇨🇳' },
        { id: 'spell', label: '拼写',    desc: '看中文输入英文', emoji: '✏️' }
      ].map(m => (
        <button key={m.id} onClick={() => setMode(m.id)}
          className="flex items-center gap-5 bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-600 rounded-xl p-5 text-left transition-all active:scale-95">
          <span className="text-4xl">{m.emoji}</span>
          <div><div className="text-white font-semibold text-lg">{m.label}</div><div className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{m.desc}</div></div>
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  )

  if (qIdx === -1) return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-12 flex flex-col items-center gap-6">
      <div className="text-6xl">🎉</div>
      <div className="text-white text-3xl font-bold">完成！</div>
      <div className="text-gray-400 text-lg">{score.right} 对 · {score.wrong} 错</div>
      <div className="flex gap-3">
        <button onClick={() => setMode(null)} className="px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-gray-800 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-gray-700">换模式</button>
        <button onClick={() => { setOrder(shuffle(unit.words.map((_, i) => i))); setQIdx(0); setScore({ right: 0, wrong: 0 }) }}
          className="px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-blue-500">再来一遍</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  )

  const current = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-4 flex flex-col gap-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <button onClick={() => setMode(null)} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">← 模式</button>
        <span className="text-gray-500">{qIdx + 1}/{order.length}</span>
        <span className="text-green-400 font-mono">{score.right}✓ {score.wrong}✗</span>
      </div>
      <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
        <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(qIdx / order.length) * 100}%` }} />
      </div>

      <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center gap-3 min-h-[180px] justify-center">
        {mode === 'en2zh' && <QuizWord word={current.word} ipa={current.ipa} />}
        {mode !== 'en2zh' && <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-blue-300">{current.zh}</div>}
        {mode === 'spell' && <div className="text-gray-500 font-mono text-xl tracking-widest">{makeBlank(current.word)}</div>}
      </div>

      {mode !== 'spell' && (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          {options.map((opt, i) => {
            const label = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh : opt.word
            const isCorrect = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh === current.zh : opt.word === current.word
            let cls = 'bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 text-gray-300 hover:border-gray-600'
            if (result && isCorrect) cls = 'bg-green-900/60 border border-green-500 text-green-200'
            else if (result && chosen === opt && !isCorrect) cls = 'bg-red-900/60 border border-red-500 text-red-300'
            return <button key={i} onClick={() => handleChoice(opt)} className={`rounded-xl p-5 text-left text-base font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 ${cls}`}>{label}</button>
          })}
        </div>
      )}
      {mode === 'spell' && (
        <form onSubmit={handleSpell} className="flex flex-col gap-3">
          <input ref={inputRef} value={input} onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)} disabled={!!result}
            placeholder="输入英文单词…"
            className={`w-full bg-gray-900 border rounded-xl px-5 py-5 text-white text-center text-xl font-mono outline-none transition-colors
              ${result === 'correct' ? 'border-green-500' : result === 'wrong' ? 'border-red-500' : 'border-gray-700 focus:border-blue-500'}`} />
          {result === 'wrong' && <div className="text-center text-red-400">正确答案：<span className="font-bold text-white text-lg">{current.word}</span></div>}
          {!result && <button type="submit" className="py-4 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold text-base">确认</button>}
        </form>
      )}
      {result && (
        <button onClick={next}
          className={`w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold text-white text-base transition-all active:scale-95 ${result === 'correct' ? 'bg-green-700 hover:bg-green-600' : 'bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600'}`}>
          {qIdx < order.length - 1 ? '下一题 →' : '查看结果'}
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function VocabStudy({ onSetBack }) {
  const [view, setView]       = useState('books')
  const [book, setBook]       = useState(null)
  const [unit, setUnit]       = useState(null)
  const [unitIdx, setUnitIdx] = useState(0)
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(loadProgress)

  const refreshProgress = useCallback((signal) => {
    setProgress(loadProgress())
    if (signal === 'goQuiz') setView('quiz')
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (view === 'books') onSetBack?.(null)
    else if (view === 'units') onSetBack?.(() => () => setView('books'))
    else if (view === 'cards') onSetBack?.(() => () => setView('units'))
    else if (view === 'quiz')  onSetBack?.(() => () => setView('cards'))
  }, [view, onSetBack])

  if (view === 'books') return <BookGrid onSelect={b => { setBook(b); setView('units') }} />
  if (view === 'units') return <UnitGrid book={book} progress={progress} onSelect={(u, ui) => { setUnit(u); setUnitIdx(ui); setView('cards') }} onBack={() => setView('books')} />
  if (view === 'cards') return <FlashCards book={book} unit={unit} unitIdx={unitIdx} progress={progress} onBack={() => setView('units')} onProgressChange={refreshProgress} />
  if (view === 'quiz')  return <QuizView  book={book} unit={unit} unitIdx={unitIdx} onBack={() => setView('cards')} onProgressChange={refreshProgress} />
  return null
}
```

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
The user requested building a complete PEP elementary school English learning app (grades 3-6) integrated into their existing `english-input-app`. Originally based on a GPT-generated spec, the design was reviewed and simplified: no image API, no separate app, no AI examples. Key decisions: integrate as a new "单词" (Vocabulary) tab, use dictionaryapi.dev for real audio, use Web Audio API for syllable-level audio slicing with IPA proportion timing, and localStorage for progress tracking. Most recently, the user replaced all vocabulary content with Grade 3 Down (三年级下册) data they provided personally, with IPA phonetics for each word, and requested the IPA proportion-based audio slicing system be implemented.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **React + TailwindCSS** - existing app stack
   - **Web Audio API** (`AudioContext`, `AudioBufferSourceNode`, `decodeAudioData`) for precise audio slicing
   - **dictionaryapi.dev** - free real human MP3 pronunciation API, no key required
   - **IPA proportion method** - count syllable nuclei from IPA string → divide audio duration equally → slice per syllable
   - **IPA parsing** - strip stress marks (ˈˌ), length marks (ː), collapse diphthongs (eɪ, aɪ, ɔɪ, əʊ, aʊ, ɪə, eə, ʊə) to count vowel nuclei
   - **Orthographic syllabification** - vowel-nucleus based algorithm for visual display
   - **MediaRecorder API** - browser recording for follow-read feature
   - **SpeechSynthesis API** - TTS fallback when real audio unavailable
   - **localStorage** - progress tracking per word (`vocab_${bookName}_${unitIdx}_${wordIdx}`)
   - **Module-level Map caches** - `urlCache` and `bufCache` persist across React renders
   - **AudioContext conflict prevention** - `stopAudio()` + `speechSynthesis.cancel()` before recording
   - **Supabase** - already connected to project at `https://jwgkjorcoqbjudycxhti.supabase.co`
   - Build: `export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/opt/node/bin:$PATH" && npm run build`

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/data/pep_words.json`**

     - New structure includes `ipa` field per word
     - 6 units, ~119 words total
     ```json
     [
       {
         "grade": 3, "sem": "down", "bookName": "三年级下册",
         "units": [
           {
             "unit": 1, "title": "Where are you from?",
             "words": [
               {"word":"teacher","ipa":"/ˈtiːtʃə(r)/","zh":"教师"},

             ]
           }

     ```

   - **`/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/components/VocabStudy.jsx`**
     - New file created then fully rewritten multiple times

     - Key functions:
     ```javascript
     // IPA syllable counting
     function countIPASyllables(ipa) {
       if (!ipa) return null
       let s = ipa.replace(/[\/\(\)\[\]ˈˌ\.]/g, '').replace(/ː/g, '')
       for (const d of ['eɪ','aɪ','ɔɪ','əʊ','aʊ','ɪə','eə','ʊə']) s = s.split(d).join('V')
       const count = (s.match(/[aeiouæɑɒɔəɜɪʊʌV]/g) || []).length
       return Math.max(1, count)
     }

     // Web Audio globals
     let _audioCtx = null
     function getCtx() {
       if (!_audioCtx || _audioCtx.state === 'closed') {
         _audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)()
       }
       if (_audioCtx.state === 'suspended') _audioCtx.resume()
       return _audioCtx
     }
     const urlCache = new Map()
     const bufCache = new Map()

     async function fetchUrl(word) {
       const key = word.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0]
       if (urlCache.has(key)) return urlCache.get(key)
       try {
         const res = await fetch(`https://api.dictionaryapi.dev/api/v2/entries/en/${encodeURIComponent(key)}`,
           { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5000) })
         if (!res.ok) throw new Error()
         const data = await res.json()
         const raw = data[0]?.phonetics?.find(p => p.audio)?.audio || null
         const url = raw ? (raw.startsWith('http') ? raw : 'https:' + raw) : null
         urlCache.set(key, url); return url
       } catch { urlCache.set(key, null); return null }
     }

     function playBuffer(buffer, startSec = 0, endSec = null) {
       stopAudio()
       const ctx = getCtx()
       const src = ctx.createBufferSource()
       src.buffer = buffer
       src.connect(ctx.destination)
       const dur = endSec != null ? endSec - startSec : buffer.duration - startSec
       src.start(0, startSec, dur)
       _currentSource = src
       return src
     }

     // useWordAudio hook
     function useWordAudio(word, ipa) {
       const syllables = useMemo(() => syllabify(word), [word])
       const realSyls  = useMemo(() => syllables.filter(s => !s.isSep), [syllables])
       const [activeSylIdx, setActiveSylIdx] = useState(-1)
       const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
       const sylCount = useMemo(() => countIPASyllables(ipa) ?? realSyls.length, [ipa, realSyls])

       async function playFull() {
         reset()
         setLoading(true)
         const buf = await getBuffer()
         setLoading(false)
         if (buf) { scheduleHighlight(buf.duration * 1000); playBuffer(buf) }
         else { speak(word, 0.5); scheduleHighlight(realSyls.length * 420) }
       }

       async function playSyl(sylIdx) {
         reset()
         setActiveSylIdx(sylIdx)
         const buf = await getBuffer()
         const n = Math.min(sylCount, realSyls.length)
         if (buf && n > 1) {
           const realIdx = realSyls.findIndex(s => s.idx === sylIdx)
           if (realIdx >= 0) {
             const perSyl = buf.duration / n
             playBuffer(buf, realIdx * perSyl, (realIdx + 1) * perSyl)
             return
           }
         }
         if (buf) { playBuffer(buf); return }
         speak(realSyls.find(s => s.idx === sylIdx)?.text || word, 0.65)
       }
       return { syllables, activeSylIdx, loading, playFull, playSyl }
     }
     ```

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **npm not found**: Shell didn't have node in PATH. Fixed with `export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/opt/node/bin:$PATH"` prefix on all build commands.
   - **TTS syllable pronunciation wrong**: "name" split into "na"+"me" by orthographic algorithm; TTS reads "na" as /næ/ not /neɪ/. Two root causes: (1) magic-e words are monosyllabic but algorithm splits them; (2) TTS has no context for isolated syllables. Solution: switched from TTS syllable playback to Web Audio API real audio slicing with IPA proportion timing.
   - **pep.txt was not a clean vocabulary file**: It was a Duck.ai conversation log with embedded vocab data starting at line 87. Grade boundaries weren't marked. Manually identified grade structure from PEP curriculum knowledge and parsed data accordingly.

5. Problem Solving:
   - **Syllable pronunciation accuracy**: Solved by abandoning TTS for syllables entirely. Instead: fetch real MP3 from dictionaryapi.dev → decode to AudioBuffer → slice buffer proportionally based on IPA syllable count. Single syllable words play full audio. Multi-syllable words get proportionally sliced segments.
   - **Audio conflict with recording**: Solved by calling `stopAudio()` and `speechSynthesis.cancel()` before starting MediaRecorder.
   - **iPad access**: Solved by using Mac's local IP (192.168.100.64) on port 8765 over same Wi-Fi.
   - **Azure API**: Determined it requires account creation (phone + credit card verification) and is not automatable. Recommended dictionaryapi.dev as sufficient free alternative.

```text
536	      : isNce3
```

```bash
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/opt/node/bin:$PATH" && node -e "
const d=require('/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/data/duolingo.json');
const Courses = require('fs').readFileSync('/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/components/Courses.jsx','utf8');
// Count lessons per unit in DUOLINGO_LESSONS
const matches = [...Courses.matchAll(/\{ unit: (\d+), label: '(L\d+)'/g)];
const byUnit = {};
for(const m of matches) {
  const u = m[1], l = m[2];
  if(!byUnit[u]) byUnit[u]=[];
  byUnit[u].push(l);
}
for(const [u,ls] of Object.entries(byUnit)) {
  console.log('Unit', u, ':', ls.length, 'lessons,', ls[0], '-', ls[ls.length-1]);
}
console.log('Total json entries:', d.length);
"
```

```text
Unit 3 : 25 lessons, L1 - L25
Unit 4 : 36 lessons, L1 - L55
Unit 5 : 32 lessons, L1 - L32
Unit 6 : 52 lessons, L1 - L52
Total json entries: 920
```

```text
1	import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
2	import pepWords from '../data/pep_words.json'
3	
4	// ── Orthographic syllabification (visual only) ────────────────────────────────
5	
6	function syllabifyOne(word) {
7	  if (!word) return []
8	  const clean = word.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, '')
9	  if (clean.length <= 3) return [word]
10	  const lower = clean.toLowerCase()
11	  const isVowel = c => 'aeiou'.includes(c)
12	  const vStarts = []
13	  for (let i = 0; i < lower.length; i++) {
14	    if (isVowel(lower[i]) && (i === 0 || !isVowel(lower[i - 1]))) vStarts.push(i)
15	    if (lower[i] === 'y' && i > 0 && !isVowel(lower[i - 1]) && i === lower.length - 1) vStarts.push(i)
16	  }
17	  if (vStarts.length <= 1) return [word]
18	  const splits = []
19	  for (let v = 0; v < vStarts.length - 1; v++) {
20	    let v1End = vStarts[v]
21	    while (v1End + 1 < lower.length && isVowel(lower[v1End + 1])) v1End++
22	    const v2Start = vStarts[v + 1]
23	    const cons = []
24	    for (let i = v1End + 1; i < v2Start; i++) cons.push(i)
25	    if (cons.length === 0) splits.push(v2Start)
26	    else if (cons.length === 1) splits.push(cons[0])
27	    else splits.push(cons[Math.floor(cons.length / 2)])
28	  }
29	  const result = []; let prev = 0
30	  for (const sp of splits) { if (sp > prev) result.push(word.slice(prev, sp)); prev = sp }
31	  if (prev < word.length) result.push(word.slice(prev))
32	  return result.filter(s => s.length > 0)
33	}
34	
35	// Returns [{text, isSep, idx}] — idx is index among real (non-sep) syllables
36	function syllabify(word) {
37	  let raw = []
38	  if (word.includes(' ')) {
39	    word.split(' ').forEach((w, i) => { if (i > 0) raw.push(' '); syllabifyOne(w).forEach(s => raw.push(s)) })
40	  } else if (word.includes('-')) {
41	    word.split('-').forEach((w, i) => { if (i > 0) raw.push('-'); syllabifyOne(w).forEach(s => raw.push(s)) })
42	  } else {
43	    raw = syllabifyOne(word)
44	  }
45	  let idx = 0
46	  return raw.map(text => ({ text, isSep: text === ' ' || text === '-', idx: (text === ' ' || text === '-') ? -1 : idx++ }))
47	}
48	
49	// ── IPA syllable count ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
50	// Used to decide how many equal-proportion slices to cut from the audio
51	
52	function countIPASyllables(ipa) {
53	  if (!ipa) return null
54	  // Strip non-phonetic decoration
55	  let s = ipa.replace(/[\/\(\)\[\]ˈˌ\.]/g, '').replace(/ː/g, '')
56	  // Collapse diphthongs to single token so they count as 1 nucleus
57	  for (const d of ['eɪ','aɪ','ɔɪ','əʊ','aʊ','ɪə','eə','ʊə']) s = s.split(d).join('V')
58	  const count = (s.match(/[aeiouæɑɒɔəɜɪʊʌV]/g) || []).length
59	  return Math.max(1, count)
60	}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
475	  }, [mode])
476	  useEffect(() => { if (mode && order.length > 0) makeOpts() }, [qIdx, order, mode])
477	  useEffect(() => { if (mode === 'spell' && inputRef.current) inputRef.current.focus() }, [qIdx, mode])
478	
479	  function makeOpts() {
480	    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
481	    const pool = shuffle(allWords.filter(w => w.word !== correct.word && w.zh !== correct.zh))
482	    setOpts(shuffle([correct, ...pool.slice(0, 3)])); setChosen(null); setResult(null); setInput('')
483	  }
484	  function handleChoice(opt) {
485	    if (result) return
486	    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
487	    const ok = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh === correct.zh : opt.word === correct.word
488	    setChosen(opt); setResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
489	    setScore(s => ok ? { ...s, right: s.right + 1 } : { ...s, wrong: s.wrong + 1 })
490	    if (ok) { saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, order[qIdx], 2); onProgressChange() }
491	  }
492	  function handleSpell(e) {
493	    e.preventDefault(); if (result) return
494	    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
495	    const ok = input.trim().toLowerCase() === correct.word.toLowerCase()
496	    setResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
497	    setScore(s => ok ? { ...s, right: s.right + 1 } : { ...s, wrong: s.wrong + 1 })
498	    if (ok) { saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, order[qIdx], 2); onProgressChange() }
499	  }
```

```text
62	// ── Web Audio globals ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```
