253	// ── Progress helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
254	
255	function loadProgress() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('vocab_progress') || '{}') } catch { return {} } }
256	function saveProgress(bookName, unitIdx, wordIdx, val) {
257	  try { const s = loadProgress(); s[`vocab_${bookName}_${unitIdx}_${wordIdx}`] = val; localStorage.setItem('vocab_progress', JSON.stringify(s)) } catch {}
258	}
259	function shuffle(arr) {
260	  const a = [...arr]
261	  for (let i = a.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));[a[i], a[j]] = [a[j], a[i]] }
262	  return a
263	}
264	function makeBlank(w) {
265	  if (w.includes(' ')) return w.split(' ').map(p => p.length <= 2 ? p : p[0] + '_'.repeat(p.length - 2) + p[p.length - 1]).join(' ')
266	  return w.length <= 2 ? w : w[0] + '_'.repeat(w.length - 2) + w[w.length - 1]
267	}
268	
269	// ── Recording hook ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
270	
271	function useRecorder() {
272	  const [recState, setRecState] = useState('idle')
273	  const [recUrl, setRecUrl]     = useState(null)
274	  const mrRef = useRef(null); const chunksRef = useRef([]); const timerRef = useRef(null)
275	
276	  function reset() {
277	    setRecState('idle')
278	    setRecUrl(prev => { if (prev) URL.revokeObjectURL(prev); return null })
279	    mrRef.current?.stream?.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
280	  }
281	  async function startRec() {
282	    try {
283	      reset(); stopAudio(); window.speechSynthesis?.cancel()
284	      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
285	      const mr = new MediaRecorder(stream); mrRef.current = mr; chunksRef.current = []
286	      mr.ondataavailable = e => { if (e.data.size > 0) chunksRef.current.push(e.data) }
287	      mr.onstop = () => { setRecUrl(URL.createObjectURL(new Blob(chunksRef.current, { type: 'audio/webm' }))); setRecState('recorded'); stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()) }
288	      mr.start(); setRecState('recording')
289	      timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => mr.state === 'recording' && mr.stop(), 4000)
290	    } catch { setRecState('idle'); alert('需要麦克风权限') }
291	  }
292	  function stopRec() { clearTimeout(timerRef.current); if (mrRef.current?.state === 'recording') mrRef.current.stop() }
293	  function playRec() { if (recUrl) { stopAudio(); window.speechSynthesis?.cancel(); new Audio(recUrl).play() } }
294	  useEffect(() => () => { clearTimeout(timerRef.current); reset() }, [])
295	  return { recState, recUrl, startRec, stopRec, playRec, reset }
296	}
297	
298	// ── Book selector ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
299	
300	const GRADE_COLORS = { 3: 'from-green-700 to-green-900', 4: 'from-blue-700 to-blue-900', 5: 'from-purple-700 to-purple-900', 6: 'from-orange-700 to-orange-900' }
301	
302	function BookGrid({ onSelect }) {
303	  return (
304	    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
305	      <h2 className="text-white text-xl font-bold mb-5">选择年级册次</h2>
306	      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
307	        {pepWords.map(book => (
308	          <button key={book.bookName} onClick={() => onSelect(book)}
309	            className={`rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br ${GRADE_COLORS[book.grade]} p-6 text-left hover:opacity-90 active:scale-95 transition-all`}>
310	            <div className="text-sm text-white/60 mb-1">{book.grade}年级 · {book.sem === 'up' ? '上' : '下'}册</div>
311	            <div className="text-white font-bold text-lg">{book.bookName}</div>
312	            <div className="text-white/50 text-sm mt-2">{book.units.length} 单元 · {book.units.reduce((s, u) => s + u.words.length, 0)} 词</div>
313	          </button>
314	        ))}
315	      </div>
316	    </div>
317	  )
318	}
319	
320	// ── Unit selector ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
321	
322	function UnitGrid({ book, progress, onSelect, onBack }) {
323	  return (
324	    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
325	      <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm mb-5 block transition-colors">← 返回</button>
326	      <h2 className="text-white text-xl font-bold mb-4">{book.bookName}</h2>
327	      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
328	        {book.units.map((unit, ui) => {
329	          const total = unit.words.length
330	          const known = unit.words.filter((_, wi) => (progress[`vocab_${book.bookName}_${ui}_${wi}`] || 0) >= 2).length
331	          const pct = total ? Math.round(known / total * 100) : 0
332	          return (
333	            <button key={ui} onClick={() => onSelect(unit, ui)}
334	              className="rounded-xl bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-600 p-5 text-left transition-all active:scale-95">
335	              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Unit {unit.unit}</div>
336	              <div className="text-white font-semibold text-base mb-3">{unit.title}</div>
337	              <div className="w-full h-2 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden mb-1.5">
338	                <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full" style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
339	              </div>
340	              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{known}/{total} 已掌握</div>
341	            </button>
342	          )
343	        })}
344	      </div>
345	    </div>
346	  )
347	}
348	
349	// ── Flash card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
350	
351	function FlashCards({ book, unit, unitIdx, progress, onBack, onProgressChange }) {
352	  const [idx, setIdx]              = useState(0)
353	  const [showZh, setShowZh]        = useState(false)
354	  const [speed, setSpeed]          = useState(0.7)
355	  const [localSeen, setLocalSeen]  = useState({})
356	  const { recState, recUrl, startRec, stopRec, playRec, reset: resetRec } = useRecorder()
357	  const word = unit.words[idx]
358	  const pendingPlayRef = useRef(false)
359	  const { syllables, activeSylIdx, loading, playFull, playSyl } = useWordAudio(word.word, speed)
360	
361	  const SPEEDS = [0.7, 1.0, 1.3]
362	  const cycleSpeed = () => setSpeed(s => SPEEDS[(SPEEDS.indexOf(s) + 1) % SPEEDS.length])
363	
364	  // 自动标记为"已看"
365	  useEffect(() => {
366	    const key = `vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${idx}`
367	    if (!(progress[key] >= 1) && !localSeen[idx]) {
368	      saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, idx, 1)
369	      setLocalSeen(m => ({ ...m, [idx]: true }))
370	      onProgressChange()
371	    }
372	  }, [idx])
373	
374	  useEffect(() => { setShowZh(false); resetRec() }, [idx])
375	
376	  useEffect(() => {
377	    if (pendingPlayRef.current) {
378	      pendingPlayRef.current = false
379	      playFull()
380	    }
381	  }, [idx])
382	
383	  function goPrev() {
384	    if (idx > 0) setIdx(i => i - 1)
385	  }
386	  function goNext() {
387	    if (idx < unit.words.length - 1) setIdx(i => i + 1)
388	    else onBack()
389	  }
390	
391	  function handleRecord() {
392	    if (recState === 'recording') { stopRec(); return }
393	    if (recState === 'recorded')  { playRec(); return }
394	    startRec()
395	  }
396	
397	  const recIcon  = recState === 'recording' ? '⏹' : recState === 'recorded' ? '▶' : '🎙'
398	  const recLabel = recState === 'recording' ? '停止' : recState === 'recorded' ? '回放' : '跟读'
399	  const recCls   = recState === 'recording' ? 'bg-red-700 border-red-500 text-white animate-pulse'
400	                 : recState === 'recorded'   ? 'bg-green-800 border-green-600 text-green-200'
401	                 :                             'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700'
402	
403	  const progKey  = `vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${idx}`
404	  const seen = (progress[progKey] || 0) >= 1
405	
406	  return (
407	    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ height: 'calc(100vh - 110px)' }}>
408	
409	      {/* Header */}
410	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between shrink-0">
411	        <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">← 返回</button>
412	        <span className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{idx + 1} / {unit.words.length}</span>
413	        <span className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${seen ? 'bg-blue-900/50 text-blue-400' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-600'}`}>
414	          {seen ? '已学习' : '未学习'}
415	        </span>
416	      </div>
417	
418	      {/* Progress bar */}
419	      <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden shrink-0">
420	        <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full transition-all" style={{ width: `${(idx / unit.words.length) * 100}%` }} />
421	      </div>
422	
423	      {/* Word card */}
424	      <div onClick={() => setShowZh(v => !v)}
425	        className="shrink-0 w-full bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 px-6 cursor-pointer hover:border-gray-500 transition-all">
426	
427	        <SyllableWord syllables={syllables} activeSylIdx={activeSylIdx} onSylClick={playSyl} size="text-7xl" />
428	
429	        <div className="text-gray-500 text-base font-mono tracking-wide">{word.ipa}</div>
430	
431	        {activeSylIdx === -1 && !loading && (
432	          <div className="text-gray-600 text-xs">点音节 · 点卡片查看中文</div>
433	        )}
434	        {loading && <div className="text-blue-400 text-sm animate-pulse">加载音频…</div>}
435	        {activeSylIdx !== -1 && <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm animate-pulse">● 播放中</div>}
436	
437	        {showZh && <div className="text-2xl text-blue-300 font-medium mt-1">{word.zh}</div>}
438	
439	        {/* Buttons row */}

442	            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 border border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95">

446	            className="bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 border border-gray-700 text-yellow-400 hover:text-yellow-300 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-mono font-bold transition-all active:scale-95">
447	            {speed}×
448	          </button>
449	          <button onClick={handleRecord}

473	                  setIdx(i)
474	                }}
475	                className={`rounded-xl py-2 px-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 text-left ${
476	                  i === idx ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white ring-2 ring-blue-400' :
477	                  lvl >= 2  ? 'bg-green-900/60 text-green-300' :
478	                  lvl === 1 ? 'bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-400' :
479	                              'bg-gray-800/80 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'}`}>
480	                <div className="text-xs opacity-60 mb-0.5 truncate">{w.zh}</div>
481	                <div className="text-sm truncate">{w.word}</div>
482	              </button>
483	            )
484	          })}
485	        </div>
486	      </div>
487	
488	      {/* Nav buttons */}
489	      <div className="flex gap-3 shrink-0">
490	        <button
491	          onClick={goPrev}
492	          disabled={idx === 0}
493	          className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold text-base transition-colors active:scale-95
494	            ${idx === 0 ? 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-600 cursor-not-allowed' : 'bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-gray-300'}`}>
495	          ← 上一个
496	        </button>
497	        <button
498	          onClick={goNext}
499	          className="flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold text-base transition-colors active:scale-95">
500	          {idx < unit.words.length - 1 ? '下一个 →' : '完成 ✓'}
501	        </button>
502	      </div>
503	    </div>
504	  )
505	}
506	
507	// ── Quiz ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
508	
509	function QuizWord({ word, ipa }) {
510	  const { syllables, activeSylIdx, playFull, playSyl } = useWordAudio(word)
511	  return (
512	    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
513	      <SyllableWord syllables={syllables} activeSylIdx={activeSylIdx} onSylClick={playSyl} size="text-4xl" />
514	      <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm font-mono">{ipa}</div>
515	      <button onClick={playFull} className="text-gray-500 hover:text-white text-sm inline-flex items-center gap-1.5">
516	        <IconSpeaker size={32} /> 发音
517	      </button>
518	    </div>
519	  )
520	}
521	
522	function QuizView({ book, unit, unitIdx, onBack, onProgressChange }) {
523	  const [mode, setMode]     = useState(null)
524	  const [qIdx, setQIdx]     = useState(0)
525	  const [options, setOpts]  = useState([])
526	  const [chosen, setChosen] = useState(null)
527	  const [input, setInput]   = useState('')
528	  const [result, setResult] = useState(null)
529	  const [score, setScore]   = useState({ right: 0, wrong: 0 })
530	  const [order, setOrder]   = useState([])
531	  const inputRef = useRef()
532	  const allWords = pepWords.flatMap(b => b.units.flatMap(u => u.words))
533	
534	  useEffect(() => {
535	    if (mode) { setOrder(shuffle(unit.words.map((_, i) => i))); setQIdx(0); setScore({ right: 0, wrong: 0 }); setChosen(null); setResult(null); setInput('') }
536	  }, [mode])
537	  useEffect(() => { if (mode && order.length > 0) makeOpts() }, [qIdx, order, mode])
538	  useEffect(() => { if (mode === 'spell' && inputRef.current) inputRef.current.focus() }, [qIdx, mode])
539	
540	  function makeOpts() {
541	    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
542	    const pool = shuffle(allWords.filter(w => w.word !== correct.word && w.zh !== correct.zh))
543	    setOpts(shuffle([correct, ...pool.slice(0, 3)])); setChosen(null); setResult(null); setInput('')
544	  }
545	  function handleChoice(opt) {
546	    if (result) return
547	    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
548	    const ok = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh === correct.zh : opt.word === correct.word
549	    setChosen(opt); setResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
550	    setScore(s => ok ? { ...s, right: s.right + 1 } : { ...s, wrong: s.wrong + 1 })
551	    if (ok) { saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, order[qIdx], 2); onProgressChange() }
552	  }
553	  function handleSpell(e) {
554	    e.preventDefault(); if (result) return
555	    const correct = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
556	    const ok = input.trim().toLowerCase() === correct.word.toLowerCase()
557	    setResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
558	    setScore(s => ok ? { ...s, right: s.right + 1 } : { ...s, wrong: s.wrong + 1 })
559	    if (ok) { saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, order[qIdx], 2); onProgressChange() }
560	  }
561	  function next() { qIdx < order.length - 1 ? setQIdx(i => i + 1) : setQIdx(-1); setResult(null); setInput(''); setChosen(null) }
562	
563	  if (!mode) return (
564	    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6 flex flex-col gap-4">
565	      <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm self-start">← 返回</button>
566	      <h2 className="text-white text-xl font-bold">{unit.title} — 练习模式</h2>
567	      {[{ id: 'en2zh', label: '英 → 中', desc: '看英文选中文', emoji: '🇬🇧' },
568	        { id: 'zh2en', label: '中 → 英', desc: '看中文选英文', emoji: '🇨🇳' },
569	        { id: 'spell', label: '拼写',    desc: '看中文输入英文', emoji: '✏️' }
570	      ].map(m => (
571	        <button key={m.id} onClick={() => setMode(m.id)}
572	          className="flex items-center gap-5 bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-600 rounded-xl p-5 text-left transition-all active:scale-95">
573	          <span className="text-4xl">{m.emoji}</span>
574	          <div><div className="text-white font-semibold text-lg">{m.label}</div><div className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{m.desc}</div></div>
575	        </button>
576	      ))}
577	    </div>
578	  )
579	
580	  if (qIdx === -1) return (
581	    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-12 flex flex-col items-center gap-6">
582	      <div className="text-6xl">🎉</div>
583	      <div className="text-white text-3xl font-bold">完成！</div>
584	      <div className="text-gray-400 text-lg">{score.right} 对 · {score.wrong} 错</div>
585	      <div className="flex gap-3">
586	        <button onClick={() => setMode(null)} className="px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-gray-800 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-gray-700">换模式</button>
587	        <button onClick={() => { setOrder(shuffle(unit.words.map((_, i) => i))); setQIdx(0); setScore({ right: 0, wrong: 0 }) }}
588	          className="px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-blue-500">再来一遍</button>
589	      </div>
590	    </div>
591	  )
592	
593	  const current = unit.words[order[qIdx]]
594	  return (
595	    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-4 flex flex-col gap-4">
596	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
597	        <button onClick={() => setMode(null)} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">← 模式</button>
598	        <span className="text-gray-500">{qIdx + 1}/{order.length}</span>
599	        <span className="text-green-400 font-mono">{score.right}✓ {score.wrong}✗</span>
600	      </div>
601	      <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
602	        <div className="h-full bg-blue-500 rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(qIdx / order.length) * 100}%` }} />
603	      </div>
604	
605	      <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center gap-3 min-h-[180px] justify-center">
606	        {mode === 'en2zh' && <QuizWord word={current.word} ipa={current.ipa} />}
607	        {mode !== 'en2zh' && <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-blue-300">{current.zh}</div>}
608	        {mode === 'spell' && <div className="text-gray-500 font-mono text-xl tracking-widest">{makeBlank(current.word)}</div>}
609	      </div>
610	
611	      {mode !== 'spell' && (
612	        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
613	          {options.map((opt, i) => {
614	            const label = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh : opt.word
615	            const isCorrect = mode === 'en2zh' ? opt.zh === current.zh : opt.word === current.word
616	            let cls = 'bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 text-gray-300 hover:border-gray-600'
617	            if (result && isCorrect) cls = 'bg-green-900/60 border border-green-500 text-green-200'
618	            else if (result && chosen === opt && !isCorrect) cls = 'bg-red-900/60 border border-red-500 text-red-300'
619	            return <button key={i} onClick={() => handleChoice(opt)} className={`rounded-xl p-5 text-left text-base font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 ${cls}`}>{label}</button>
620	          })}
621	        </div>
622	      )}
623	      {mode === 'spell' && (
624	        <form onSubmit={handleSpell} className="flex flex-col gap-3">
625	          <input ref={inputRef} value={input} onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)} disabled={!!result}
626	            placeholder="输入英文单词…"
627	            className={`w-full bg-gray-900 border rounded-xl px-5 py-5 text-white text-center text-xl font-mono outline-none transition-colors
628	              ${result === 'correct' ? 'border-green-500' : result === 'wrong' ? 'border-red-500' : 'border-gray-700 focus:border-blue-500'}`} />
629	          {result === 'wrong' && <div className="text-center text-red-400">正确答案：<span className="font-bold text-white text-lg">{current.word}</span></div>}
630	          {!result && <button type="submit" className="py-4 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold text-base">确认</button>}
631	        </form>
632	      )}
633	      {result && (
634	        <button onClick={next}
635	          className={`w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold text-white text-base transition-all active:scale-95 ${result === 'correct' ? 'bg-green-700 hover:bg-green-600' : 'bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600'}`}>
636	          {qIdx < order.length - 1 ? '下一题 →' : '查看结果'}
637	        </button>
638	      )}
639	    </div>
640	  )
641	}
642	
643	// ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
644	
645	export default function VocabStudy({ onSetBack }) {
646	  const [view, setView]       = useState('books')
647	  const [book, setBook]       = useState(null)
648	  const [unit, setUnit]       = useState(null)
649	  const [unitIdx, setUnitIdx] = useState(0)
650	  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(loadProgress)
651	
652	  const refreshProgress = useCallback((signal) => {
653	    setProgress(loadProgress())
654	    if (signal === 'goQuiz') setView('quiz')
655	  }, [])
656	
657	  useEffect(() => {
658	    if (view === 'books') onSetBack?.(null)
659	    else if (view === 'units') onSetBack?.(() => () => setView('books'))
660	    else if (view === 'cards') onSetBack?.(() => () => setView('units'))
661	    else if (view === 'quiz')  onSetBack?.(() => () => setView('cards'))
662	  }, [view, onSetBack])
663	
664	  if (view === 'books') return <BookGrid onSelect={b => { setBook(b); setView('units') }} />
665	  if (view === 'units') return <UnitGrid book={book} progress={progress} onSelect={(u, ui) => { setUnit(u); setUnitIdx(ui); setView('cards') }} onBack={() => setView('books')} />
666	  if (view === 'cards') return <FlashCards book={book} unit={unit} unitIdx={unitIdx} progress={progress} onBack={() => setView('units')} onProgressChange={refreshProgress} />
667	  if (view === 'quiz')  return <QuizView  book={book} unit={unit} unitIdx={unitIdx} onBack={() => setView('cards')} onProgressChange={refreshProgress} />
668	  return null
669	}
```
</details></tool-use>

25	export default function ExerciseView({ sentences, progress, onMarkMastered, onMarkReview, onIncrementAttempts, settings, initialIndex = 0, onProgressChange, onNav, userId }) {
26	  const [index, setIndex] = useState(initialIndex)
27	  const [completed, setCompleted] = useState(false)
28	  const [key, setKey] = useState(0)
29	
30	  // ---- speak gate (controlled by settings.requireSpeak only) ----
31	  const srSupported = !!(window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition)
32	  const gateEnabled = !!settings?.requireSpeak
33	  const [speakUnlocked, setSpeakUnlocked] = useState(!gateEnabled)
34	  const [isRecording, setIsRecording]     = useState(false)
35	  const [speakPhase, setSpeakPhase]       = useState('idle') // idle | recording | success | fail
36	  const [speakAttempts, setSpeakAttempts] = useState(0)
37	  const [recResult, setRecResult]         = useState('')
38	  const [recWords, setRecWords]           = useState({ target: [], spoken: [], matched: [] })
39	  const recognitionRef = useRef(null)
40	
41	  const speakActive = gateEnabled && !speakUnlocked
42	
43	  const [showCard, setShowCard]         = useState(false)
44	  const [showList, setShowList]         = useState(false)
45	  const [chunkIndex, setChunkIndex]     = useState(0)
46	  const [splitLevel, setSplitLevel]     = useState(0) // 0=off, 1=初级, 2=中级, 3=高级
47	  const splitMode = splitLevel > 0
48	  const [chunkTranslations, setChunkTranslations] = useState([])
49	  const { speak } = useTTS(settings)
50	  const { playError, playCorrect, playVictory, playKeypress, playBubble, playFireworks } = useSound(settings)
51	  const [currentWordIndex, setCurrentWordIndex] = useState({ idx: 0, total: 0 })
52	  const [completeBubbles, setCompleteBubbles]   = useState([])
53	  const [fwSparks, setFwSparks] = useState([])
54	
55	  const FW_COLORS = ['#ff4d4d','#ffcc00','#4dff88','#4db8ff','#ff80ff','#ff9933','#fff','#c084fc']
56	
57	  const chunks = useMemo(() => {
58	    const sentence = sentences[index]
59	    if (!sentence || !splitMode) return null
60	    return buildSplitChunksLevel(sentence.en, splitLevel)
61	  }, [index, sentences, splitMode, splitLevel])
62	
63	  // Fetch Chinese translation for each chunk when chunks change
64	  useEffect(() => {
65	    if (!chunks || chunks.length === 0) { setChunkTranslations([]); return }
66	    setChunkTranslations(chunks.map(() => ''))
67	    chunks.forEach((chunk, i) => {
68	      fetch(`https://api.mymemory.translated.net/get?q=${encodeURIComponent(chunk)}&langpair=en|zh`, {
69	        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5000)
70	      })
71	        .then(r => r.json())
72	        .then(json => {
73	          const text = json?.responseData?.translatedText || ''
74	          if (text && !/[a-zA-Z]{5,}/.test(text)) {
75	            setChunkTranslations(prev => { const n = [...prev]; n[i] = text; return n })
76	          }
77	        })
78	        .catch(() => {})
79	    })
80	  }, [chunks])
81	
82	  const activeSentence = useMemo(() => {
83	    const s = sentences[index]
84	    if (!s) return s
85	    if (chunks) {
86	      const zh = chunkTranslations[chunkIndex] || ''
87	      return { ...s, en: chunks[chunkIndex], zh: zh || s.zh }
88	    }
89	    return s
90	  }, [sentences, index, chunks, chunkIndex, chunkTranslations])
91	
92	  // Reset speak gate on new sentence / retry / setting change
93	  useEffect(() => {
94	    setSpeakUnlocked(!gateEnabled)
95	    setIsRecording(false)
96	    setRecResult('')
97	    setSpeakAttempts(0)
98	    setSpeakPhase('idle')
99	    setRecWords({ target: [], spoken: [], matched: [] })
100	    if (recognitionRef.current) { recognitionRef.current.stop(); recognitionRef.current = null }
101	  }, [index, key, settings?.requireSpeak])
102	
103	  // Auto-play on new sentence (no gate)
104	  useEffect(() => {
105	    const sentence = sentences[index]
106	    if (!sentence || gateEnabled || completed) return
107	    if (settings.sentenceSpeak) setTimeout(() => speak(sentence.en), 300)
108	  }, [index, key])
109	
110	  // Auto-play when speak gate activates (so child hears sentence before reading)
111	  useEffect(() => {
112	    if (speakActive && sentence) {
113	      const textToSpeak = (splitMode && chunks) ? chunks[chunkIndex] : sentence.en
114	      setTimeout(() => speak(textToSpeak), 700)
115	    }
116	  }, [speakActive])
117	
118	  useEffect(() => {
119	    onProgressChange?.(index, sentences.length)
120	  }, [index, sentences.length])
121	
122	  useEffect(() => {
123	    onNav?.({
124	      prev: goPrev,
125	      next: goNext,
126	      retry: () => { setCompleted(false); setKey(k => k + 1) },
127	      mastered: () => onMarkMastered(sentence?.id),
128	      review: () => onMarkReview(sentence?.id),
129	      speak: () => speak(sentence?.en),
130	      toggleCard: () => setShowCard(v => !v),
131	      toggleList: () => setShowList(v => !v),
132	      toggleSplit: () => { setSplitLevel(v => v > 0 ? 0 : 2); setChunkIndex(0); setKey(k => k + 1) },
133	      setSplitLevel: (level) => { setSplitLevel(v => v === level ? 0 : level); setChunkIndex(0); setKey(k => k + 1) },
134	      splitMode,
135	      splitLevel,
136	      showList,
137	      attempts: progress[`sentence_${sentences[index]?.id}`]?.attempts || 0,
138	      status: progress[`sentence_${sentences[index]?.id}`]?.status || 'new',
139	      canPrev: index > 0,
140	      canNext: index < sentences.length - 1,
141	    })
142	  }, [index, sentences.length, completed, progress, splitMode, splitLevel, showCard, showList])
143	
144	  const sentence = sentences[index]
```
</details></tool-use>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I understand the ExerciseView structure. The key things to change:

1. The "强制跟读" (requireSpeak) toggle → "隐藏跳过" - meaning when enabled, it hides the skip button in the speak gate UI

2. After 5 failed recordings, auto-accept as correct (set speakUnlocked = true after speakAttempts >= 5)

Wait, re-reading the request more carefully: "强制跟读 → 隐藏跳过 (hide skip button when enabled)". This means the button name/function changes - the current "强制跟读" setting should instead be renamed to "隐藏跳过" and its behavior is to hide the skip button.
 
Looking at the actual implementation, I see the skip button is conditionally rendered based on splitMode and hideSplitSkip settings. The request is asking me to rename the "强制跟读" setting to "隐藏跳过" and make it control whether the skip button appears at all - when this setting is enabled, the skip button should be completely hidden from the speak gate UI. Looking at the JSX changes needed: rename the "强制跟读" toggle to "隐藏跳过" so that when enabled, it hides the skip button across all inputs, and add logic to auto-accept after 5 failed recording attempts. I need to reconsider what the user actually wants here. Looking at the request more carefully, it seems like they want to change the setting's purpose entirely—instead of forcing speech recognition before typing, it should just hide the skip button when enabled. The speak gate would still exist, but skipping it becomes impossible when this setting is on. After 5 failed attempts, the system auto-accepts anyway to prevent users from getting stuck. So I need to update the setting label to reflect this new function, modify the skip button visibility logic to check if this setting is enabled, and add the auto-accept logic when attempts reach 5. I'm tracking down where speakAttempts gets incremented to understand the flow better, then I'll add the useEffect hook that monitors this counter and automatically unlocks the gate once it hits 5 failed attempts.
</details></think>

2. **"一键设置" (one-click preset) button** - A button that, when ON, applies the user's "current preferred settings" as defaults. 

So the preset button should save the current settings configuration and restore it as the default every time the settings panel opens, essentially creating a "Save as defaults" functionality. I'm realizing the user wants a way to save their current settings configuration as a default preset—so when they toggle on the "一键设置" button, it locks in their current setup, and every time they open settings afterward, it automatically restores to those saved defaults. Essentially, it's a "capture and restore" feature to prevent accidental changes to their preferred configuration. the core feature is that when settings opens, it should load the saved default configuration if one exists and a toggle is enabled, rather than starting from whatever's currently in state. I need to add a "保存当前设置为默认" button to store the preset to localStorage, then check for that saved default on mount and apply it automatically. I think the clearest approach is to treat "一键设置" as a toggle that locks in the current settings as a preset—when it's enabled, entering settings always reverts to that saved configuration, giving users a quick way to reset to their preferred state. I'm settling on a straightforward approach: store the active tab in localStorage so it persists between opens, add a "一键设置" button that saves the current settings as a default preset, and include a restore button to load that preset back. I should be careful with the implementation to avoid bugs, especially around when and how the defaults get applied.

Now I need to locate the skip and next buttons in the codebase to understand how to hide them based on the settings.

Let me understand the user's requests for VocabStudy:

Also increase the small word buttons by 2.5x (but they already are 2.5x... wait, the user says "增大到原来2.5倍" - increase to 2.5x of the ORIGINAL size. The original was text-sm in 4-column grid. After my last change it's text-base in 3-column with aspect-ratio 16:9. The user says still too big for the main card and make the small ones bigger. Let me re-read...
   - "单词卡片太大了" - the main flashcard is too big
   - "小单词组占满屏就行了" - the word group should fill the screen without being oversized
   - "不要太大和滚动" - avoid excessive size and scrolling
   - "下面的小单词也增大一些增大到原来2.5倍" - the small buttons need to be 2.5x their original size (text-sm at 14px), so they should be around 35px now

Wait, I'm second-guessing the interpretation. Let me reconsider whether the user meant 2.5x the original pre-change size or 2.5x larger than what they currently are. Given they said "增大一些" (enlarge a little), maybe they want a more modest increase, but "原来2.5倍" is pretty explicit about the multiplier. I think I should go with text-4xl or similar to hit that 2.5x target, even if it seems large.

For the layout without scrolling, I need to be strategic about the grid—if there are too many words, I might need to reduce columns or adjust card sizing to keep everything visible. Let me think about what works best for fitting everything on screen while making those words significantly bigger. I need to use `alignContent: 'stretch'` on the grid so all rows expand to fill the available height without scrolling. For the text size, multiplying the original `text-sm` by 2.5 gives around 35px, but that's too large for these cards—`text-xl` or `text-2xl` would be more appropriate.

The user is asking again for the small text to be 2.5x larger, which suggests they're still not satisfied with the current size, so I should go bigger with `text-lg` or `text-xl`. I'm also noticing there's a new "默写" button that should appear next to the speed button, separate from the header toggle I already added.

Looking at the structure, the word card should have the mic button, the large word, the speed multiplier, and now this new dictation button in a row. When dictation mode is active, the small word buttons below behave differently.

I'm realizing the user might want to replace the header toggle entirely with this word card button, or they might want both. Given they described the exact same behavior (hiding words, showing input box, revealing after completion), I think they're asking to move the functionality to the word card row instead of keeping it in the header.

The enhancement involves hiding word text with dashes during dictation mode, revealing them once all words are completed, and restructuring the input display to show IPA and Chinese pronunciation below the input field with space bar triggering audio playback. So I need to restructure the 默写 mode completely—moving the toggle from the header to the word row, and redesigning how it works. When it's active, the main card hides the English word and shows an input field with IPA and Chinese meaning below for reference, while the word grid displays blanks instead of actual words. Only after completing the entire dictation exercise do the words reappear in the grid.

I'm tracking which words have been correctly dictated in a set, and once all words in the unit are completed, the reveal happens. For the space key behavior, I'm implementing it so that pressing space in an empty input field triggers the audio playback without adding a character—though I need to figure out how this handles compound words that might actually need spaces.

355	// ── Flash card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
356	
357	function FlashCards({ book, unit, unitIdx, wordOffset = 0, progress, onBack, onProgressChange }) {
358	  const [idx, setIdx]             = useState(0)
359	  const [showZh, setShowZh]       = useState(false)
360	  const [speed, setSpeed]         = useState(0.7)
361	  const [localSeen, setLocalSeen] = useState({})
362	  const [moXie, setMoXie]         = useState(false)
363	  const [moInput, setMoInput]     = useState('')
364	  const [moResult, setMoResult]   = useState(null)
365	  const moInputRef                = useRef()
366	  const { recState, startRec, stopRec, playRec, reset: resetRec } = useRecorder()
367	  const word = unit.words[idx]
368	  const pendingPlayRef = useRef(false)
369	  const { syllables, activeSylIdx, loading, playFull, playSyl } = useWordAudio(word.word, speed)
370	
371	  const SPEEDS = [0.7, 1.0, 1.3]
372	  const cycleSpeed = () => setSpeed(s => SPEEDS[(SPEEDS.indexOf(s) + 1) % SPEEDS.length])
373	
374	  useEffect(() => {
375	    const key = `vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${wordOffset + idx}`
376	    if (!(progress[key] >= 1) && !localSeen[idx]) {
377	      saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, wordOffset + idx, 1)
378	      setLocalSeen(m => ({ ...m, [idx]: true }))
379	      onProgressChange()
380	    }
381	  }, [idx])
382	
383	  useEffect(() => { setShowZh(false); resetRec(); setMoInput(''); setMoResult(null) }, [idx])
384	
385	  useEffect(() => {
386	    if (pendingPlayRef.current) { pendingPlayRef.current = false; playFull() }
387	  }, [idx])
388	
389	  useEffect(() => {
390	    if (moXie && moInputRef.current) moInputRef.current.focus()
391	  }, [moXie, idx])
392	
393	  function goNext() {
394	    if (idx < unit.words.length - 1) setIdx(i => i + 1)
395	    else onBack()
396	  }
397	
398	  function handleRecord() {
399	    if (recState === 'recording') { stopRec(); return }
400	    if (recState === 'recorded')  { playRec(); return }
401	    startRec()
402	  }
403	
404	  function checkMoXie() {
405	    if (!moInput.trim()) return
406	    const ok = moInput.trim().toLowerCase() === word.word.toLowerCase()
407	    setMoResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
408	    if (ok) { saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, wordOffset + idx, 2); onProgressChange() }
409	  }
410	
411	  const recCls = recState === 'recording' ? 'bg-red-700 border-red-500 text-white animate-pulse'
412	               : recState === 'recorded'   ? 'bg-green-800 border-green-600 text-green-200'
413	               :                             'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700'
414	
415	  const seen = (progress[`vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${wordOffset + idx}`] || 0) >= 1
416	
417	  return (
418	    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ height: 'calc(100vh - 110px)' }}>
419	
420	      {/* Header */}
421	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between shrink-0">
422	        <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">← 返回</button>
423	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
424	          <span className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{idx + 1} / {unit.words.length}</span>
425	          <button onClick={() => { setMoXie(v => !v); setMoInput(''); setMoResult(null) }}
426	            className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors ${moXie ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-500 hover:text-white'}`}>
427	            默写
428	          </button>
429	        </div>
430	        <span className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${seen ? 'bg-blue-900/50 text-blue-400' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-600'}`}>
431	          {seen ? '已学习' : '未学习'}
432	        </span>
433	      </div>
434	
435	      {/* Word card or 默写 */}
436	      {!moXie ? (
437	        <div onClick={() => setShowZh(v => !v)}
438	          className="shrink-0 w-full bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center gap-2 py-6 px-6 cursor-pointer hover:border-gray-500 transition-all">
439	
440	          {/* Row: mic紧贴单词左侧，speed紧贴右侧，整组居中 */}
441	          <div className="flex justify-center items-center gap-2" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
442	            <button onClick={handleRecord}
443	              className={`flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-xl border transition-all active:scale-95 shrink-0 ${recCls}`}>
444	              {recState === 'recording' ? (
445	                <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><rect x="5" y="5" width="14" height="14" rx="2"/></svg>
446	              ) : recState === 'recorded' ? (
447	                <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21"/></svg>
448	              ) : (
449	                <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round">
450	                  <path d="M12 1a3 3 0 0 0-3 3v8a3 3 0 0 0 6 0V4a3 3 0 0 0-3-3z"/>
451	                  <path d="M19 10v2a7 7 0 0 1-14 0v-2"/>
452	                  <line x1="12" y1="19" x2="12" y2="23"/>
453	                  <line x1="8" y1="23" x2="16" y2="23"/>
454	                </svg>
455	              )}
456	            </button>
457	            <SyllableWord syllables={syllables} activeSylIdx={activeSylIdx} onSylClick={playSyl} size="text-7xl" />
458	            <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); cycleSpeed() }}
459	              className="w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 border border-gray-700 text-yellow-400 rounded-xl text-sm font-mono font-bold transition-all active:scale-95 shrink-0">
460	              {speed}×
461	            </button>
462	          </div>
463	
464	          <div className="text-gray-500 text-base font-mono tracking-wide">{word.ipa}</div>
465	          {activeSylIdx === -1 && !loading && recState === 'idle' && (
466	            <div className="text-gray-600 text-xs">点音节发音 · 点卡片查看中文</div>
467	          )}
468	          {loading && <div className="text-blue-400 text-sm animate-pulse">加载音频…</div>}
469	          {activeSylIdx !== -1 && <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm animate-pulse">● 播放中</div>}
470	          {recState === 'recording' && <div className="text-red-400 text-xs animate-pulse">● 录音中（4秒自动停）</div>}
471	          {recState === 'recorded' && <div className="text-green-400 text-xs">已录音 · 点麦克风播放</div>}
472	          {showZh && <div className="text-2xl text-blue-300 font-medium mt-1">{word.zh}</div>}
473	        </div>
474	      ) : (
475	        <div className="shrink-0 w-full bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center gap-3 py-6 px-6">
476	          <div className="text-blue-300 text-2xl font-medium">{word.zh}</div>
477	          <button onClick={playFull}
478	            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm transition-colors">
479	            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21"/></svg>
480	            听发音
481	          </button>
482	          <input ref={moInputRef}
483	            value={moInput}
484	            onChange={e => { setMoInput(e.target.value); if (moResult) setMoResult(null) }}
485	            onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter' && !moResult) checkMoXie() }}
486	            disabled={!!moResult}
487	            placeholder="输入英文…"
488	            className={`w-full bg-gray-800 border rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white text-center text-xl font-mono outline-none transition-colors
489	              ${moResult === 'correct' ? 'border-green-500' : moResult === 'wrong' ? 'border-red-500' : 'border-gray-700 focus:border-blue-500'}`}
490	          />
491	          {moResult === 'correct' && <div className="text-green-400 font-medium">✓ 正确！</div>}
492	          {moResult === 'wrong' && <div className="text-red-400 text-sm">✗ 正确答案：<span className="text-white font-bold text-base">{word.word}</span></div>}
493	          {!moResult ? (
494	            <button onClick={checkMoXie} className="px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold text-sm">确认</button>
495	          ) : (
496	            <button onClick={() => { setMoInput(''); setMoResult(null); goNext() }}
497	              className="px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600 text-white text-sm">下一个 →</button>
498	          )}
499	        </div>
500	      )}
501	
502	      {/* Word grid — 3列，16:9 卡片 */}
503	      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto min-h-0">
504	        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
505	          {unit.words.map((w, i) => {
506	            const lvl = progress[`vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${wordOffset + i}`] || 0

For tracking completed words, I'll use a plain object instead of a Set for easier state management—mapping word indices to true. When toggling dictation mode on, I'll reset this tracker. The grid will fill available height without scrolling, and words stay hidden during dictation unless already completed. I'm also handling the space key in the input field to trigger playback.

Setting up the check function to validate the user's input against the word, mark it correct with a brief delay before auto-advancing to the next word, and save progress along the way.

Now I'm laying out the word grid to fill the available space without scrolling, using CSS Grid with three columns and dynamically calculated rows based on the word count. For visibility, I'll hide words that haven't been completed yet by showing dots instead, and I'm trimming down the main card styling with smaller padding and text size while removing the hint line to keep everything compact.

For the 默写 card, I'm removing the separate audio button since the space key handles that, and instead showing the IPA and Chinese as hints below the input field. When the user gets a word correct, I need to show a checkmark briefly, then auto-advance after a short delay by resetting the input and result state before moving to the next word.

The layout structure differs between normal and 默写 modes—normal mode displays the word prominently with controls, while 默写 mode shows the Chinese hint above an input field with smaller supporting text below. I'll implement the 默写 toggle as a small pill button positioned next to the speed control.

  ```jsx
  <div className="shrink-0 w-full bg-gray-900 border border-purple-800/60 rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center gap-2 py-3 px-4">
    <input ref={moInputRef}
      onKeyDown={e => {
        if (e.key === ' ' && !moInput.trim()) { e.preventDefault(); playFull(); return }
        if (e.key === 'Enter' && !moResult) checkMoXie()
      }}
      placeholder="输入英文… (空格键听音)"
      autoComplete="off" autoCapitalize="off" spellCheck="false"
    />
    {/* IPA + Chinese hints below */}
    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs">
      <span className="text-gray-500 font-mono">{word.ipa}</span>
      <span className="text-blue-400/70">{word.zh}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  ```

  **checkMoXie with auto-advance:**
  ```jsx
  function checkMoXie() {
    if (!moInput.trim()) return
    const ok = moInput.trim().toLowerCase() === word.word.toLowerCase()
    setMoResult(ok ? 'correct' : 'wrong')
    if (ok) {
      saveProgress(book.bookName, unitIdx, wordOffset + idx, 2)
      onProgressChange()
      setMoXieDone(prev => ({ ...prev, [idx]: true }))
      setTimeout(() => { setMoInput(''); setMoResult(null); goNext() }, 600)
    }
  }
  ```

  **Word grid (no scroll, fills screen):**
  ```jsx
  <div className="min-h-0" style={{
    flex: 1,
    display: 'grid',
    gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(3, 1fr)',
    gridTemplateRows: `repeat(${gridRows}, 1fr)`,
    gap: '6px',
  }}>
    {unit.words.map((w, i) => {
      const hidden = moXie && !allMoXieDone && !moXieDone[i]
      return (
        <button ...>
          {hidden
            ? <span className="text-gray-600 text-lg tracking-widest">···</span>
            : <span className="text-xl font-semibold truncate px-2">{w.word}</span>
          }
        </button>
      )
    })}
  </div>
  ```

- **`/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/components/ExerciseView.jsx`**
  - Skip button hidden when `gateEnabled`: `{!gateEnabled && <button>跳过</button>}`
  - 5-fail auto-accept: `useEffect(() => { if (speakAttempts >= 5 && speakActive) setSpeakUnlocked(true) }, [speakAttempts])`

- **`/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/components/Settings.jsx`**
  - Tab memory: `useState(() => { try { return localStorage.getItem('settings_tab') || 'voice' } catch { return 'voice' } })`
  - Preset save/restore with `settings_preset` localStorage key
  - Header buttons: "📌 一键设置 / 更新默认" + "⚡ 一键还原"
  - Toggle label changed to "🚫 隐藏跳过和下一个按钮" (key: `hideSplitSkip`)

- **`/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/components/Unit1Flow.jsx`**
  - `FillBlankCard({ q, onResult, requireSpeak, hideSkipNext })`: skip button hidden when `hideSkipNext`
  - `Unit1Flow({ unitLabel, bookId, requireSpeak, hideSkipNext, onClose })`: "下一题" button hidden when `hideSkipNext`
  - FillBlankCard usage: `<FillBlankCard ... hideSkipNext={hideSkipNext} ...>`

- **`/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/components/Textbook.jsx`**

- **`/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/components/SyncPractice.jsx`**

  - `SyncPractice({ onSetBack, requireSpeak, hideSkipNext })` - passes to TextbookDetail

  - Added `hideSkipNext={settings?.hideSplitSkip !== false}` to Textbook
  - Added both props to SyncPractice

4. Errors and Fixes:
- No build errors encountered this session. All `npm run build` calls resulted in `✓ built in ~1.5s` with only pre-existing chunk size warning.
- `moXieDone` uses plain object (not `Set`) for React state compatibility - Sets don't trigger re-renders reliably.

5. Problem Solving:
- **wordOffset for A/B splits**: When unit is split into halves, progress keys must use `wordOffset + idx` not just `idx`. FlashCards receives `wordOffset` prop, all `saveProgress` and `progress[key]` calls updated.
- **Word grid no-scroll filling screen**: `gridTemplateRows: repeat(N, 1fr)` with `flex: 1` on the container distributes rows evenly to fill available height without scrolling.
- **默写 space=play**: `onKeyDown` intercepts space when `moInput` is empty, calls `playFull()` and `preventDefault()` to prevent space character insertion.
- **Settings preset not overwriting on every open**: Preset is only applied when user explicitly clicks "⚡ 一键还原", not automatically on mount.

```text
      {/* Header: 返回 | 进度 | 已学习badge */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between shrink-0">
        <button onClick={onBack} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">← 返回</button>
        <span className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{idx + 1} / {unit.words.length}</span>
        <span className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${seen ? 'bg-blue-900/50 text-blue-400' : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-600'}`}>
          {seen ? '已学习' : '未学习'}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* 主卡 — 紧凑布局 */}
      {!moXie ? (
        <div
          className="shrink-0 w-full bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center gap-1.5 py-3 px-4 transition-all">

          {/* mic | word | speed× | 默写 */}
          <div className="flex justify-center items-center gap-2" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <button onClick={handleRecord}
              className={`flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-lg border transition-all active:scale-95 shrink-0 ${recCls}`}>
              {recState === 'recording' ? (
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><rect x="5" y="5" width="14" height="14" rx="2"/></svg>
              ) : recState === 'recorded' ? (
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21"/></svg>
              ) : (
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round">
                  <path d="M12 1a3 3 0 0 0-3 3v8a3 3 0 0 0 6 0V4a3 3 0 0 0-3-3z"/>
                  <path d="M19 10v2a7 7 0 0 1-14 0v-2"/>
                  <line x1="12" y1="19" x2="12" y2="23"/>
                  <line x1="8" y1="23" x2="16" y2="23"/>
                </svg>
              )}
            </button>
            <SyllableWord syllables={syllables} activeSylIdx={activeSylIdx} onSylClick={playSyl} size="text-5xl" />
            <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); cycleSpeed() }}
              className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 border border-gray-700 text-yellow-400 rounded-lg text-xs font-mono font-bold transition-all active:scale-95 shrink-0">
              {speed}×
            </button>
            <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleMoXie() }}
              className={`w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg border text-xs font-bold transition-all active:scale-95 shrink-0
                ${moXie ? 'bg-purple-700 border-purple-500 text-white' : 'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'}`}>
              写
            </button>
          </div>

          <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm font-mono tracking-wide">{word.ipa}</div>
          {loading && <div className="text-blue-400 text-xs animate-pulse">加载音频…</div>}
          {recState === 'recording' && <div className="text-red-400 text-xs animate-pulse">● 录音中</div>}
          {recState === 'recorded' && <div className="text-green-400 text-xs">已录音 · 点麦克风播放</div>}
          <div className="text-xl text-blue-300 font-medium">{word.zh}</div>
        </div>
      ) : (
        /* 默写模式主卡 */
        <div className="shrink-0 w-full bg-gray-900 border border-purple-800/60 rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center gap-2 py-3 px-4">
          {/* 顶行：标题 + 默写按钮 */}
          <div className="w-full flex items-center justify-between">
            <span className="text-purple-400 text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider">默写模式</span>
            <button onClick={toggleMoXie}
              className="w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center bg-purple-700 border border-purple-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold">
              写
            </button>
          </div>
          {/* 输入框 */}
          <input ref={moInputRef}
            value={moInput}
            onChange={e => { setMoInput(e.target.value); if (moResult === 'wrong') setMoResult(null) }}
            onKeyDown={e => {
              if (e.key === ' ' && !moInput.trim()) { e.preventDefault(); playFull(); return }
              if (e.key === 'Enter' && !moResult) checkMoXie()
            }}
            disabled={moResult === 'correct'}
            placeholder="输入英文… (空格键听音)"
            autoComplete="off" autoCapitalize="off" spellCheck="false"
            className={`w-full bg-gray-800 border rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-white text-center text-xl font-mono outline-none transition-colors
              ${moResult === 'correct' ? 'border-green-500 bg-green-900/20' : moResult === 'wrong' ? 'border-red-500' : 'border-gray-700 focus:border-purple-500'}`}
          />
          {/* 音标 + 中文提示 */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs">
            <span className="text-gray-500 font-mono">{word.ipa}</span>
            <span className="text-gray-600">·</span>
            <span className="text-blue-400/70">{word.zh}</span>
          </div>
          {/* 反馈 */}
          {moResult === 'correct' && <div className="text-green-400 text-sm font-semibold">✓ 正确！跳转中…</div>}
          {moResult === 'wrong' && (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <span className="text-red-400 text-xs">✗ 正确答案：<span className="text-white font-bold">{word.word}</span></span>
              <button onClick={checkMoXie} className="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600 text-gray-300 rounded">再试</button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 单词格 — 填满剩余高度，无滚动 */}
      <div className="min-h-0" style={{
        flex: 1,
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(3, 1fr)',
        gridTemplateRows: `repeat(${gridRows}, 1fr)`,
        gap: '6px',
      }}>
        {unit.words.map((w, i) => {
          const lvl = progress[`vocab_${book.bookName}_${unitIdx}_${wordOffset + i}`] || 0
          const hidden = moXie && !allMoXieDone && !moXieDone[i]
          return (
            <button key={i} onClick={() => {
                setMoInput(''); setMoResult(null)
                if (i === idx) { playFull(); return }
                pendingPlayRef.current = true
                setIdx(i)
              }}
              className={`rounded-xl font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden ${
                i === idx ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white ring-2 ring-blue-400' :
                lvl >= 2  ? 'bg-green-900/60 text-green-300' :
                lvl === 1 ? 'bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-400' :
                            'bg-gray-800/80 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700'}`}>
              {hidden
                ? <span className="text-gray-600 text-lg tracking-widest">···</span>
                : <span className="text-xl font-semibold truncate px-2">{w.word}</span>
              }
            </button>
          )
        })}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Extract high school English textbook word lists from PDFs using pdftotext + Gemma 4b (ollama).
Outputs: src/data/hs_words.json

Run: python3 scripts/parse_high_school.py
Resume-safe: skips already-processed books on re-run.
"""
import json, re, os, subprocess, sys, time

DATA_DIR = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '../src/data')
BOOK_DIR  = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/课本')
OUT_FILE  = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'hs_words.json')
MODEL     = 'gemma3:4b'

BOOKS = [
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语必修 第一册.pdf',      'bookName': '必修第一册',     'sem': 'required1', 'units': 5},
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语必修 第二册.pdf',      'bookName': '必修第二册',     'sem': 'required2', 'units': 5},
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语必修 第三册.pdf',      'bookName': '必修第三册',     'sem': 'required3', 'units': 5},
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语选择性必修 第一册.pdf', 'bookName': '选择性必修第一册', 'sem': 'optional1', 'units': 4},
---
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Parse 单词表 txt/rtf files → pep_words.json entries.
Handles grade5下, grade6上, grade6下.
Run: python3 scripts/parse_small_school.py
"""
import json, re, sys, os

DATA_DIR = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '../src/data')
WORDLIST_DIR = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/单词表')
PEP_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'pep_words.json')

# ── RTF decoder ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def rtf_to_text(rtf_bytes):
    r"""Strip RTF markup, decode \uNNNN? sequences to plain text."""
    text = rtf_bytes.decode('latin-1', errors='replace')
    # \uNNNN? → Unicode char
    def repl_u(m):
        n = int(m.group(1))
        if n < 0: n += 65536
```
</details></tool-use>

改动内容：

**单词卡片高度修复**（解决第一张图中卡片过高的问题）：
- 每行高度从 `1fr`（无限拉伸）→ `minmax(52px, 72px)`，最高 72px
- `alignContent: 'start'` 让卡片不再撑满全屏
- 圆角从 `rounded-xl` → `rounded-2xl`，更接近截图效果

**高中词汇显示修复**（顺带修复）：
- BookGrid 高中卡片显示"高中 · 必修一"而不是"高中年级 · 下册"
- 高中书籍有玫瑰红配色

Outputs: src/data/hs_words.json

BOOK_DIR  = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/课本')

]

def pdf_to_text(pdf_path):

```text
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Extract high school English textbook word lists from PDFs using pdftotext + Gemma 4b (ollama).
Outputs: src/data/hs_words.json

Run: python3 scripts/parse_high_school.py
Resume-safe: skips already-processed books on re-run.
"""
import json, re, os, subprocess, sys, time

DATA_DIR = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '../src/data')
BOOK_DIR  = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/课本')
OUT_FILE  = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'hs_words.json')
MODEL     = 'gemma3:4b'

BOOKS = [
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语必修 第一册.pdf',      'bookName': '必修第一册',     'sem': 'required1', 'units': 5},
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语必修 第二册.pdf',      'bookName': '必修第二册',     'sem': 'required2', 'units': 5},
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语必修 第三册.pdf',      'bookName': '必修第三册',     'sem': 'required3', 'units': 5},
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语选择性必修 第一册.pdf', 'bookName': '选择性必修第一册', 'sem': 'optional1', 'units': 4},
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语选择性必修 第二册.pdf', 'bookName': '选择性必修第二册', 'sem': 'optional2', 'units': 4},
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语选择性必修 第三册.pdf', 'bookName': '选择性必修第三册', 'sem': 'optional3', 'units': 4},
    {'file': '普通高中教科书·英语选择性必修 第四册.pdf', 'bookName': '选择性必修第四册', 'sem': 'optional4', 'units': 4},
]

# ── PDF extraction ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def pdf_to_text(pdf_path):
    r = subprocess.run(['pdftotext', '-layout', pdf_path, '-'], capture_output=True)
    return r.stdout.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')

def find_wordlist_section(text):
    """
    The real word list appears at the SECOND occurrence of the header.
    The first is the table of contents entry.
    The section ends at 'Vocabulary' (alpha index) or 'Irregular Verbs'.
    """
    marker = 'Words and Expressions in Each Unit'
    first  = text.find(marker)
    second = text.find(marker, first + 1) if first >= 0 else -1
    start  = second if second >= 0 else (first if first >= 0 else 0)

    # Find end of word list section
    section = text[start:]
    end_markers = ['Irregular Verbs', 'Vocabulary\n', 'VOCABULARY\n', '不规则动词']
    end = len(section)
    for em in end_markers:
        idx = section.find(em, 200)  # skip the header itself
        if 0 < idx < end:
            end = idx
    return section[:end]

def split_into_unit_chunks(section, num_units):
    """Split word list section into per-unit text chunks."""
    # Match "Welcome Unit", "Unit 1" ... "Unit N"
    pat = re.compile(r'\b(Welcome\s+Unit|Unit\s+\d+)\b', re.I)
    boundaries = [(m.start(), m.group(0)) for m in pat.finditer(section)]

    # Keep only unique, in-range labels
    seen, kept = set(), []
    for pos, label in boundaries:
        key = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', label.strip().lower())
        if key not in seen:
            seen.add(key)
            kept.append((pos, label))

    if len(kept) < 2:
        return [('All', section)]

    chunks = []
    for i, (pos, label) in enumerate(kept):
        end = kept[i+1][0] if i+1 < len(kept) else len(section)
        chunks.append((label.strip(), section[pos:end]))
    return chunks

# ── Gemma via ollama CLI ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PROMPT = """\
You are extracting vocabulary from a Chinese high school English textbook word list.

The text was extracted via pdftotext and the IPA phonetics are CORRUPTED (wrong characters).
Ignore the garbled IPA in the text — generate correct standard IPA yourself for each word.

Extract every English word/phrase and its Chinese meaning. Output ONLY a raw JSON array, no explanation, no markdown fences.

Format:
[
  {{"word": "exchange", "ipa": "/ɪksˈtʃeɪndʒ/", "zh": "交换；交流"}},
  {{"word": "look forward to", "ipa": "/lʊk ˈfɔːwəd tə/", "zh": "盼望；期待"}}
]

Rules:
- word: exact English word or phrase
- ipa: YOUR generated standard IPA in /slashes/
- zh: Chinese definition only (no English pos labels like n./vt./adj.)
- Include derived forms and collocations that appear as separate entries
- Skip: headings, page numbers, proper nouns (names/countries)
- Output ONLY the JSON array

Text ({unit_label}):
---
{chunk}
---
"""

def call_gemma(prompt):
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(
            ['ollama', 'run', MODEL, '--nowordwrap'],
            input=prompt.encode('utf-8'),
            capture_output=True,
            timeout=240,
        )
        return result.stdout.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        print(" [timeout]", end='')
        return ''

def extract_json(text):
    # Strip ANSI escape sequences (color, cursor, etc.)
    text = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]', '', text)
    text = re.sub(r'\x1b\][^\x07]*\x07', '', text)
    # Strip markdown code fences
    text = re.sub(r'```(?:json)?\s*', '', text)
    # Fix unquoted IPA values: "ipa": /xxx/ → "ipa": "/xxx/"
    text = re.sub(r'("ipa"\s*:\s*)(/[^,}\n"]+/)', r'\1"\2"', text)
    # Find JSON array
    m = re.search(r'\[[\s\S]*\]', text)
    if not m:
        return []
    raw = m.group(0).strip()
    # Try to parse
    try:
        return json.loads(raw)
    except json.JSONDecodeError:
        # Fix trailing commas
        raw = re.sub(r',\s*([\]}])', r'\1', raw)
        if not raw.rstrip().endswith(']'):
            # Truncated — recover complete entries
            entries = re.findall(r'\{[^{}]+\}', raw)
            try:
                return json.loads('[' + ','.join(entries) + ']')
            except:
                return []
        try:
            return json.loads(raw)
        except:
            return []

def validate(words):
    out = []
    for w in words:
        if not isinstance(w, dict):
            continue
        word = str(w.get('word', '')).strip()
        zh   = str(w.get('zh',   '')).strip()
        ipa  = str(w.get('ipa',  '')).strip()
        if not word or not zh or len(word) > 80:
            continue
        out.append({"word": word, "ipa": ipa, "zh": zh})
    return out

# ── Process one book ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def process_book(book):
    pdf_path = os.path.join(BOOK_DIR, book['file'])
    if not os.path.exists(pdf_path):
        print(f"  [MISSING] {book['file']}")
        return None

    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"  {book['bookName']}")
    text    = pdf_to_text(pdf_path)
    section = find_wordlist_section(text)
    chunks  = split_into_unit_chunks(section, book['units'])
    print(f"  {len(chunks)} unit chunks found")

    MAX_CHUNK = 2500  # chars — keeps Gemma response fast and reliable

    units = []
    for label, chunk in chunks:
        unit_num = 0 if 'welcome' in label.lower() else int(re.search(r'\d+', label).group())

        # Skip header noise at start of Welcome Unit chunk
        if 'welcome' in label.lower():
            # Advance past any non-word lines (headers, notes)
            lines = chunk.splitlines()
            start = 0
            for i, line in enumerate(lines):
                if re.search(r'[a-z]{3,}\s+/[^\n/]+/', line) or re.search(r'[a-z]{4,}', line):
                    start = i
                    break
            chunk = '\n'.join(lines[start:])

        # Split large chunks into sub-chunks
        sub_chunks = [chunk[i:i+MAX_CHUNK] for i in range(0, len(chunk), MAX_CHUNK)]
        all_words = []

        for si, sub in enumerate(sub_chunks):
            suffix = f" part {si+1}/{len(sub_chunks)}" if len(sub_chunks) > 1 else ""
            print(f"  {label}{suffix}: {len(sub)} chars → Gemma...", end='', flush=True)
            prompt   = PROMPT.format(unit_label=label, chunk=sub)
            response = call_gemma(prompt)
            words    = validate(extract_json(response))
            print(f" {len(words)} words")
            all_words.extend(words)
            time.sleep(0.3)

        if all_words:
            units.append({"unit": unit_num, "title": label, "words": all_words})

    return {
        "grade":    "高中",
        "sem":      book['sem'],
        "bookName": book['bookName'],
        "units":    units,
    }

# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def main():
    # Verify ollama is available
    r = subprocess.run(['ollama', 'list'], capture_output=True, timeout=5)
    if r.returncode != 0:
        print("ERROR: ollama not available"); sys.exit(1)
    if MODEL.split(':')[0] not in r.stdout.decode():
        print(f"ERROR: model {MODEL} not found. Run: ollama pull {MODEL}"); sys.exit(1)

    # Load existing results (resume support)
    results = []
    done_sems = set()
    if os.path.exists(OUT_FILE):
        results    = json.load(open(OUT_FILE, encoding='utf-8'))
        done_sems  = {b['sem'] for b in results}
        print(f"Resuming — already done: {done_sems}")

    for book in BOOKS:
        if book['sem'] in done_sems:
            print(f"[skip] {book['bookName']}")
            continue
        entry = process_book(book)
        if entry:
            results.append(entry)
            json.dump(results, open(OUT_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8'),
                      ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
            print(f"  ✓ saved {book['bookName']}")

    total = sum(len(b['units']) for b in results)
    print(f"\n✓ Done. {len(results)} books, {total} units → {OUT_FILE}")

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Extract English sentences + Chinese translations from PEP primary school PDFs.
Uses pdftotext + Gemma 4b (ollama).

Outputs per book: src/data/grade5_down.json, grade6_up.json, grade6_down.json
Format: [{id, en, zh}, ...]   (flat array, same as grade5_up.json)

Run: python3 scripts/parse_sentences.py
Resume-safe: skips already-done output files.
"""
import json, re, os, subprocess, sys, time

DATA_DIR = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '../src/data')
BOOK_DIR = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/课本')
MODEL    = 'gemma3:4b'

BOOKS = [
    {
        'file':    '义务教育教科书·英语（三年级起点）五年级下册.pdf',
        'out':     'grade5_down.json',
        'units':   6,
        'grade':   '5',
        'sem':     'down',
    },
    {
        'file':    '义务教育教科书·英语（PEP）（三年级起点）六年级上册.pdf',
        'out':     'grade6_up.json',
        'units':   6,
        'grade':   '6',
        'sem':     'up',
    },
    {
        'file':    '义务教育教科书·英语（三年级起点）六年级下册.pdf',
        'out':     'grade6_down.json',
        'units':   6,
        'grade':   '6',
        'sem':     'down',
    },
]

# ── PDF helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def pdf_to_text(pdf_path):
    r = subprocess.run(['pdftotext', '-layout', pdf_path, '-'], capture_output=True)
    return r.stdout.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')

# Key section headers that contain real sentences
SECTION_MARKERS = re.compile(
    r"Let'?s\s+(?:talk|learn|try|spell|chant|check|read|sing)|"
    r"Read\s+and\s+(?:write|tick|match)|"
    r"Listen\s+and\s+(?:chant|match|number|tick)|"
    r"Role.play|"
    r"Reading\s+time|"
    r"Make\s+a\s+list|"
    r"Story\s+time|"
    r"Self\s+check",
    re.I
)

UNIT_HEADER = re.compile(r'^\s*(?:Unit\s+(\d+)|Recycle\s+\d+)\b', re.I | re.M)

def split_by_unit(text, num_units):
    """Split PDF text into per-unit chunks."""
    boundaries = [(m.start(), m.group(0).strip()) for m in UNIT_HEADER.finditer(text)]

    # De-duplicate (TOC vs actual content — take later occurrences)
    seen, real = {}, []
    for pos, label in boundaries:
        key = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', label.lower())
        seen[key] = (pos, label)
    for key in sorted(seen, key=lambda k: seen[k][0]):
        real.append(seen[key])
    real.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])

    # Keep only the last occurrence of each unit label (skip TOC copy)
    by_unit = {}
    for pos, label in real:
        key = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', label.lower())
        by_unit[key] = (pos, label)

    ordered = sorted(by_unit.values(), key=lambda x: x[0])

    chunks = []
    for i, (pos, label) in enumerate(ordered):
        end = ordered[i+1][0] if i+1 < len(ordered) else len(text)
        chunk = text[pos:end]
        # Only keep sections with real sentence content (has section markers)
        if SECTION_MARKERS.search(chunk):
            chunks.append((label, chunk))
    return chunks

def extract_sections(chunk):
    """Pull out text from teaching sections only, skip activity instructions."""
    lines = chunk.splitlines()
    in_section = False
    kept = []
    for line in lines:
        stripped = line.strip()
        if SECTION_MARKERS.match(stripped):
            in_section = True
            continue
        # Stop at student activity prompts / appendix-like lines
        if re.match(r'^(Appendix|Words\s+in|Vocabulary|Songs\s+in|Ask\s+and|Write\s+and|Practise|Look\s+and|Draw\s+and|Work\s+with)', stripped, re.I):
            in_section = False
        if in_section and stripped:
            kept.append(stripped)
    return '\n'.join(kept)

# ── Gemma ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PROMPT = """\
You are processing text from a Chinese primary school English textbook (People's Education Press, PEP).

The text below is extracted from one unit's teaching sections (Let's talk, Let's learn, Reading time, etc.).

Your job:
1. Find every complete English sentence (dialogue lines, reading text, key expressions).
2. For each sentence, provide a natural Chinese translation suitable for elementary students.
3. Skip: single words, headings, page numbers, instructions like "Listen and tick", student activity prompts.
4. Keep: full English sentences with subject+verb (or clear imperative), dialogue exchanges.

Output ONLY a raw JSON array, no markdown fences, no explanation.

Format:
[
  {{"en": "When do you get up?", "zh": "你什么时候起床？"}},
  {{"en": "I often get up at 7 o'clock.", "zh": "我经常在7点起床。"}}
]

Rules:
- en: the exact English sentence as it appears
- zh: natural, accurate Chinese translation
- Preserve all sentences; include both sides of dialogues
- Skip purely Chinese text
- Output ONLY the JSON array

Unit text:
---
{text}
---
"""

def call_gemma(prompt):
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(
            ['ollama', 'run', MODEL, '--nowordwrap'],
            input=prompt.encode('utf-8'),
            capture_output=True,
            timeout=300,
        )
        return result.stdout.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        print(" [timeout]", end='', flush=True)
        return ''

def extract_json(text):
    # Strip ANSI escape sequences
    text = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]', '', text)
    text = re.sub(r'\x1b\][^\x07]*\x07', '', text)
    # Strip markdown fences
    text = re.sub(r'\```(?:json)?\s*', '', text)
    m = re.search(r'\[[\s\S]*\]', text)
    if not m:
        return []
    raw = m.group(0).strip()
    try:
        return json.loads(raw)
    except json.JSONDecodeError:
        # Fix trailing commas
        raw = re.sub(r',\s*([\]}])', r'\1', raw)
        # Recover partial entries
        entries = re.findall(r'\{[^{}]+\}', raw)
        try:
            return json.loads('[' + ','.join(entries) + ']')
        except:
            return []

def validate(items):
    out = []
    seen_en = set()
    for item in items:
        if not isinstance(item, dict):
            continue
        en = str(item.get('en', '')).strip()
        zh = str(item.get('zh', '')).strip()
        # Must be a real sentence: has a space, not too short/long, not duplicate
        if not en or not zh or len(en) < 5 or len(en) > 300:
            continue
        if ' ' not in en and "'" not in en:
            continue  # single word
        if en in seen_en:
            continue
        seen_en.add(en)
        out.append({'en': en, 'zh': zh})
    return out

# ── Process one book ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
MAX_CHUNK = 2000  # chars per Gemma call

def process_book(book):
    pdf_path = os.path.join(BOOK_DIR, book['file'])
    if not os.path.exists(pdf_path):
        print(f"  [MISSING] {book['file']}")
        return None

    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"  Grade {book['grade']} {'上' if book['sem']=='up' else '下'}册  →  {book['out']}")

    text   = pdf_to_text(pdf_path)
    chunks = split_by_unit(text, book['units'])
    print(f"  {len(chunks)} unit sections found")

    all_sentences = []
    id_counter = 1

    for unit_label, unit_chunk in chunks:
        section_text = extract_sections(unit_chunk)
        if not section_text.strip():
            print(f"  [{unit_label}] no usable text, skipping")
            continue

        # Split into sub-chunks if large
        sub_chunks = [section_text[i:i+MAX_CHUNK]
                      for i in range(0, len(section_text), MAX_CHUNK)]

        unit_sentences = []
        for si, sub in enumerate(sub_chunks):
            sfx = f" p{si+1}/{len(sub_chunks)}" if len(sub_chunks) > 1 else ""
            print(f"  {unit_label}{sfx}: {len(sub)}c → Gemma...", end='', flush=True)
            prompt   = PROMPT.format(text=sub)
            response = call_gemma(prompt)
            items    = validate(extract_json(response))
            print(f" {len(items)} sentences")
            unit_sentences.extend(items)
            time.sleep(0.3)

        # Add id fields
        for item in unit_sentences:
            item['id'] = id_counter
            id_counter += 1
        all_sentences.extend(unit_sentences)

    print(f"  Total: {len(all_sentences)} sentences")
    return all_sentences

# ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def main():
    # Check ollama
    r = subprocess.run(['ollama', 'list'], capture_output=True, timeout=5)
    if r.returncode != 0:
        print("ERROR: ollama not available"); sys.exit(1)

    for book in BOOKS:
        out_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, book['out'])
        if os.path.exists(out_path):
            existing = json.load(open(out_path, encoding='utf-8'))
            print(f"[skip] {book['out']} already exists ({len(existing)} sentences)")
            continue

        sentences = process_book(book)
        if sentences:
            json.dump(sentences, open(out_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8'),
                      ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
            print(f"  ✓ saved → {out_path}")

    print("\n✓ All done.")

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

```

Now test the unit detection logic before running Gemma:

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-11 23:58:27Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Test unit split logic for grade6_down

```bash
python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
# Quick test of split logic
import subprocess, re

ORDINALS = {'one':'1','two':'2','three':'3','four':'4','five':'5','six':'6'}
SECTION_MARKERS = re.compile(
    r\"Let[\u2019']?s\s+(?:talk|learn|try|spell|chant|check|read|sing)|Read\s+and\s+(?:write|tick|match)\",
    re.I
)
UNIT_HEADER = re.compile(
    r'^\s*(?:Unit\s+(\d+)|Unit\s+(One|Two|Three|Four|Five|Six)|Recycle\s+\d+)\b',
    re.I | re.M
)

def normalize(label):
    def rep(m):
        word = m.group(1).lower()
        return 'Unit ' + ORDINALS.get(word, word)
    return re.sub(r'Unit\s+(One|Two|Three|Four|Five|Six)', rep, label, flags=re.I)

r = subprocess.run(['pdftotext', '-layout',
    '/Users/hong/Desktop/课本/义务教育教科书·英语（三年级起点）六年级下册.pdf', '-'],
    capture_output=True)
text = r.stdout.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')

boundaries = [(m.start(), normalize(m.group(0).strip())) for m in UNIT_HEADER.finditer(text)]
by_unit = {}
for pos, label in boundaries:
    key = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', label.lower())
    if key not in by_unit:
        by_unit[key] = []
    by_unit[key].append((pos, label))

for key, occs in by_unit.items():
    chosen = occs[-1]
    for pos, label in occs:
        look = text[pos:pos+3000]
        if SECTION_MARKERS.search(look):
            chosen = (pos, label)
            break
    look = text[chosen[0]:chosen[0]+300]
    has_sec = bool(SECTION_MARKERS.search(text[chosen[0]:chosen[0]+3000]))
    print(f'{key}: pos={chosen[0]} has_section={has_sec} preview={repr(look[:80])}')
" 2>&1
```

unit 4: pos=26455 has_section=True preview='\x0c                  Unit Four\n\n\n\n\n Binbin, that’s\n your father.\n\n\n               '

Calculate unit splits

```bash
node -e "
// Calculate unit slice boundaries for grade5_down, grade6_up, grade6_down
// by finding first sentence of each unit (heuristic: group by sequences)
// For now just show total counts and let us use equal-ish splits

const g5d = require('./src/data/grade5_down.json')
const g6u = require('./src/data/grade6_up.json')
const g6d = require('./src/data/grade6_down.json')

console.log('grade5_down:', g5d.length, '| sample[0]:', g5d[0].en)
console.log('grade6_up:', g6u.length, '| sample[0]:', g6u[0].en)
console.log('grade6_down:', g6d.length, '| sample[0]:', g6d[0].en)

// Show first/last sentence of each rough 6-unit split for grade5_down
const s5 = Math.floor(g5d.length / 6)
for(let i=0;i<6;i++){
  const start = i*s5, end = i===5?g5d.length:(i+1)*s5
  console.log('5d Unit'+(i+1)+': ['+start+','+end+'] '+g5d[start].en.slice(0,40))
}
const s6u = Math.floor(g6u.length / 6)
for(let i=0;i<6;i++){
  const start = i*s6u, end = i===5?g6u.length:(i+1)*s6u
  console.log('6u Unit'+(i+1)+': ['+start+','+end+'] '+g6u[start].en.slice(0,40))
}
const s6d = Math.floor(g6d.length / 4)
for(let i=0;i<4;i++){
  const start = i*s6d, end = i===3?g6d.length:(i+1)*s6d
  console.log('6d Unit'+(i+1)+': ['+start+','+end+'] '+g6d[start].en.slice(0,40))
}
"
```
